description:

, VRBO, Expedia, or similar

title: Social Media Manager & Content Creator
description:
Job Overview

We are seeking a high-level Social Media Manager & Multi-Asset Creator to take full ownership of our brand’s digital footprint. You will not be required to film videos of yourself or others; instead, your primary focus is on high-quality Graphic Design (Flyers/Posts) and Strategic Writing (Blogs/Ad Copy).



We need a "Do-er" who can take a rough idea and turn it into a beautiful flyer, a compelling blog post, and a high-converting
 ad without constant hand-holding.



Key Responsibilities

Graphic Design: Create professional-grade flyers, carousels, and social media posts using Canva or Adobe Creative Suite.



SMM Management: Plan and schedule content across all platforms 
, Instagram, LinkedIn, etc.).



Blogging & SEO: Research and write 1–2 weekly blog posts that drive traffic and establish brand authority.



Ad Copywriting: Write persuasive copy for Meta/Google ads that focuses on clicks and conversions.



Asset Creation: Design digital PDFs, lead magnets, and promotional materials for our sales funnel.



Analytics: Provide a weekly report on engagement and conversion metrics.



Qualifications & Skills

Portfolio Required: Must show previous work involving flyer design and long-form blog writing.



Expert Copywriter: Ability to write in a natural, native-sounding English "Brand Voice."



Design Eye: High proficiency in Canva or Photoshop. You must understand layout, typography, and color theory.



Platform Mastery: Understanding of how to optimize posts for different algorithms (e.g., hashtags for IG vs. keywords for LinkedIn).



Independence: You are a self-starter who hits deadlines and brings new ideas to the table.

title: Practicum & Internship Placement Coordinator (Contract Role)
description:
Seeking a detail-oriented and proactive individual to assist in securing a clinical counseling practicum and internship placement for a graduate-level counseling student beginning Summer 2026. This role involves researching eligible clinical sites, contacting organizations directly, gathering program requirements, managing correspondence, and coordinating next steps to secure an interview and placement.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

• Research local counseling clinics, private practices, community agencies, and mental health organizations that host counseling practicum students

• Reach out to identified sites via
 and phone to inquire about student placement opportunities

• Compile and track placement requirements, supervisor credentials, and intake processes for each organization

• Review student counseling resources and information related to practicum/internship requirements on the student portal

• Verify eligibility criteria for practicum placement and confirm alignment with program and state requirements

• Coordinate introductions and schedule interviews between the student and prospective clinical sites

• Maintain outreach tracking logs, communications history, and placement status updates

• Serve as the primary point of contact with organizations until a placement is secured



QUALIFICATIONS

• Strong written and verbal communication skills

• Comfortable making outreach calls and writing professional
s

• Highly organized, with strong research and coordination abilities

• Familiarity with mental health, counseling, social work, or healthcare settings is a plus

• Prior experience in academic placement, HR, or administrative coordination is beneficial but not required



ENGAGEMENT DETAILS

• Contract-based, short-term role ending once placement is secured

• Start date: Flexible, targeting placement for Summer 2026

• Remote role with localized outreach to regional clinics and counseling organizations

• Compensation: To be discussed



SUCCESS OUTCOME

Successful placement of the student with an approved practicum/internship site that satisfies program and clinical experience requirements for Summer 2026.

title: Chat Support
description:
We’re looking for a sharp, fast, and reliable Inbox Manager to handle high-volume conversations across
, SMS, and chat platforms.



This is not a passive role — you’ll be actively engaging, qualifying, and moving conversations forward in real time.



What You’ll Be Doing:

-Responding to inbound messages quickly and professionally

-Managing high daily message volume (hundreds to thousands/day)

-Qualifying leads based on simple criteria

-Tagging, organizing, and updating conversations in CRM

-Escalating hot opportunities to the sales team

-Keeping response times fast (ideally under 2–5 minutes)



Requirements (Non-Negotiable):

-Fluent English (written + comprehension) — must sound natural and human

-Strong ability to understand context and reply appropriately

-Stable internet connection (no frequent disconnects)

-Ability to work in fast-paced, high-volume environments

-Detail-oriented and organized

-Available for consistent shifts (include your availability when applying)



Bonus Points If You Have:

-Experience in customer support, sales, or chat-based roles

-Familiarity with CRMs (GoHighLevel, HubSpot, etc.)

-Experience handling leads or appointment setting

-Fast typing speed



Compensation

$4/hour base



Bonuses based on:

Speed of replies

Quality of conversations

Qualified leads generated



Top performers will have opportunities for increased hours, higher pay, and long-term roles.



How to Apply



Include the following:



A short voice note introducing yourself (to confirm English fluency)

Your internet speed (screenshot preferred)

Your availability (hours + timezone)

Any relevant experience

Important



We’re building a high-performance team. If you’re slow to respond, inconsistent, or need constant supervision, this won’t be a fit.



If you’re fast, sharp, and reliable — you’ll do very well here.

title: Cold Caller

• Call business owners (contractors) using provided leads

• Ask simple questions and follow a script

• Book qualified appointments on our calendar

title: Looker Studio & Tracking Specialist — Remote, Contract
description:
Disruptiv Ltd is a digital marketing agency supporting clients across SEO, PPC, and paid social. We’re looking for a Looker Studio expert who can build reliable reporting systems and ensure tracking is set up correctly from the ground up.



The Role



This is not just a dashboard role.



We need someone who understands how data flows from source to report, and can ensure everything is accurate, connected, and delivered on time.



You’ll be responsible for both:



Building and maintaining Looker Studio reports

Supporting or advising on tracking setup and data accuracy



This role is critical to how we report performance to clients.



What you’ll do: 



Build and maintain Looker Studio dashboards for client reporting

Connect and manage data sources (Google Ads, GA4, Meta, etc.)

Ensure data accuracy across platforms and reports

Troubleshoot discrepancies between platforms

Set up and validate conversion tracking (GA4, GTM, pixels, events)

Support campaign tracking (UTMs, naming conventions, structure)

Create clear, easy-to-read reporting views for internal and client use

Deliver reports on time and keep them consistently updated

Document tracking setups and reporting logic where needed

You’ll be a fit if you…

Have strong experience with Looker Studio (Data Studio)

Understand how tracking, attribution, and reporting connect together

Can confidently work with GA4, Google Tag Manager, and ad platforms

Are detail-oriented and care about data accuracy

Are reliable and meet deadlines without needing to be chased

Can spot issues in data and proactively investigate

Communicate clearly and keep things organised

Must-have experience

Looker Studio dashboard creation and maintenance

GA4 setup and reporting

Google Tag Manager (event + conversion tracking)

Working with paid media data (Google Ads, Meta Ads)

UTM tracking and campaign structure

Bonus (strong advantage)

Experience working with international campaigns (including Philippines)

Experience setting up tracking from scratch for new accounts

Understanding of attribution challenges across platforms

Ability to recommend improvements to tracking setups

Experience working with agencies

Working style

Fully remote

Async-friendly communication

Clear deadlines and expectations

Focus on reliability, accuracy, and consistency

title: Expert PDF Editor / Document Specialist (High Precision)
description:
Overview

We are seeking an extremely detail-oriented PDF Specialist to assist with complex document editing. This is not a basic data entry role. You will be responsible for modifying PDF documents, often without access to original source files, to produce professional, seamless results that are indistinguishable from the originals.



If you are the type of person who is bothered by a font being slightly off or a line being misaligned by a single pixel, this is the role for you. We have a consistent stream of tasks for someone who prides themselves on "pixel-perfect" execution.



Key Responsibilities

Advanced PDF Editing: Modify text, layout, and graphics within PDF files using Adobe Acrobat Pro and other advanced tools.



Visual Matching: Replicate fonts, kerning, spacing, and formatting exactly to ensure edited sections are identical to the original document.



Quality Assurance: Perform rigorous self-checks to ensure zero discrepancies in alignment, font weight, or color.



Document Reconstruction: Recreate elements in flattened documents to maintain a professional, "native" look.



Required Qualifications

Expert Level Adobe Acrobat Pro: Comprehensive knowledge of the software is non-negotiable.



Design Literacy: Proficiency in Photoshop or Illustrator to recreate complex document elements when necessary.



Keen Eye for Detail: You must be able to spot inconsistencies that others miss.



Technical Independence: Ability to produce high-quality work without needing a source file (Word, InDesign, etc.).



Work Details

Location: Remote (Philippines).



Schedule: Open to Part-Time or Full-Time.



Compensation: Competitive; based on expertise and speed.



How to Apply

To ensure you have read this entire post and are as detail-oriented as we require, you must follow these instructions exactly:



Send an
 to 
 Line: Must start with the word "Obsessive" followed by your name (e.g., Obsessive - Juan Dela Cruz).



The First Line of your
: Must state exactly which version of Adobe Acrobat you are currently using.



The Last Line of your
: Must include the word "Cinnabar".



Please include:

Your resume (PDF format only)

Any relevant university/college transcript

Any relevant national testing results (optional)

A brief summary of your experience with high-precision PDF editing including what tools you're experienced with.

Your availability and desired hourly rate.



Applications that do not follow the subject line and keyword instructions will be discarded immediately.

title: Customer Service Representative
description:
Location: Remote



Job Overview



We are seeking a professional, reliable, and customer-focused Customer Service Representative to support our growing exterior construction company. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys assisting homeowners, managing both inbound and outbound communication, and ensuring a seamless customer experience from initial contact through project completion.



This is a long-term remote opportunity for a detail-oriented individual who can work independently while adhering to established processes and systems.

title: Videographer
description:
About Disruptiv Ltd



Disruptiv Ltd is a digital marketing agency supporting clients across SEO, PPC, content, and creative. We’re hiring a videographer who can move fast using AI, producing high-quality short-form video content at scale for marketing campaigns.



The Role



This is not a traditional videographer role.



We need someone who can combine video editing + AI-assisted production to deliver content quickly, consistently, and at scale.



Speed, organisation, and reliability are just as important as creative ability.



What you’ll do

Create short-form video content for social (organic + ads): hooks, cutdowns, captions, pacing

Produce multiple variations of videos (different hooks, formats, CTAs)

Use AI tools to speed up editing, scripting, captioning, and repurposing

Turn around content quickly while maintaining quality

Create simple motion graphics, overlays, and branded video formats

Build repeatable workflows (templates, prompts, editing systems)

Keep projects organised (file naming, version control, source-of-truth folders)

Provide clear status updates in our project system (e.g. Asana)

QA everything before delivery (timing, captions, formatting, brand consistency)

You’ll be a fit if you…

Have strong video editing skills for short-form content

Are fast and efficient — you can turn around content quickly

Are confident using AI tools to speed up video production

Have experience creating content for ads and social media

Think in systems (templates, repeatable workflows, scalable output)

Are reliable and organised — you communicate clearly and don’t need chasing

Understand performance creative basics (hook, pacing, retention, CTA, testing mindset)

AI focus (must-have)



We are specifically looking for someone who:



Uses AI tools to increase speed and output (not just experimenting)

Can quickly generate and iterate video content using AI

Uses AI for scripting, captions, editing, or repurposing

Understands how to balance speed with quality

Tools (examples — you can recommend your own stack)

CapCut / Premiere Pro / Final Cut / After Effects

AI tools for video editing, captions, scripting, or repurposing

Bonus: tools for voice, dubbing, cleanup, upscaling, background removal

Output examples we expect

15–30s short-form edits (UGC-style, founder-led, promo cutdowns)

Hook variations and ad creatives

Captioned videos optimised for social platforms

Repeatable templates for scaling content

Working style

Remote-first, async-friendly

Weekly priorities + clear deadlines

Fast iterations with feedback loops

We care about speed, consistency, and visible progress updates

Contract / hours



Part-time or contract to start (with scope to increase)



Paid hourly or per agreed scope (based on experience and speed)



Application Question(s)

What tools do you use to edit videos?

How many years of experience do you have in videography/video editing?

Do you have experience creating short-form content for ads or social?

Please share 2 examples of your video work

What AI tools do you use in your workflow, and how do they help you deliver content faster

title: Sales Operations & Project Coordinator
description:
Role Overview



We are looking for a highly organized, proactive, and fast-paced Sales Operations & Project Coordinator to support the CEO and COO in a growing international e-commerce and distribution business.



This role is critical in ensuring that ideas are executed, projects are delivered on time, and sales operations run smoothly. You will act as the bridge between strategy and execution, working across sales, marketing, and operations.



Key Responsibilities: 



1. Project Management (Core Function)

•Build and manage Gantt charts and project timelines

•Track and oversee:

•Product launches

•Distributor projects

•Marketing initiatives

•Ensure projects are delivered on time and within scope



Tools: Asana, ClickUp, Excel



2. Execution & Follow-Ups

•Capture and track all CEO/management ideas

•Convert ideas into:

-Actionable tasks

-Clear deadlines

-Assigned owners

•Ensure consistent follow-through until completion

 Example workflow:

Idea ? Documented ? Assigned ? Tracked ? Completed



3. Sales & Client Support

•Follow up with:

-Distributors

-Retail partners

-Leads and opportunities

-Support the sales team in moving deals forward



This is a sales enabler role, not a direct closer



4. Data Management & Reporting

•Build and maintain reports using Excel:

•Sales tracking

•SKU performance

•Inventory monitoring

•Utilize:

-Pivot tables

-Data analysis tools

-Provide actionable insights to support decision-making



5. Cross-Team Coordination

•Work closely with:

-CEO

-COO

-Sales Team

-Marketing Team



You will act as the operational “glue” of the company, ensuring alignment and execution across teams



 6. Communication & Responsiveness (Critical)

•Maintain fast and clear communication

•Operate with a real-time mindset

•Avoid delays in responses or follow-ups



Candidate Profile:

Must-Have Qualifications

•Experience working with physical products (inventory, logistics, or e-commerce)

•Strong Excel skills (pivot tables required)

•Proven experience in project management (Gantt charts, task tracking)

•Basic understanding of sales processes

•Experience working with US or Canadian clients



Preferred Traits

•Highly organized and detail-oriented

•Proactive and solution-driven

•Agile and adaptable in a fast-paced environment

•Strong sense of ownership and accountability

•Comfortable working under pressure

•Flexible with schedule when needed



Not a Fit If You:

•Prefer a rigid 9–5 structure

•Have a purely BPO/call center mindset

•Require constant supervision

•Are slow to respond or reactive in nature

•Work Environment

•Fast-paced, entrepreneurial setting

•Constantly evolving priorities

•Requires flexibility and initiative



 This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a dynamic, high-growth environment and is willing to go beyond standard expectations when needed



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

•Tasks completed on time

•Zero missed follow-ups

•Successful project execution

•CEO/COO initiatives implemented effectively

•Sales support efficiency

•First 90 Days Success Plan



Month 1

•Learn company operations, products, and workflows

•Understand ongoing projects

•Begin documenting processes



Month 2

•Take ownership of follow-ups

•Manage 1–2 active projects



Month 3

•Independently run multiple projects

•Reduce operational load on leadership

•Improve execution speed across teams



Why This Role Matters

•This position is a critical layer in the company’s growth:

•Reduces bottlenecks at the leadership level

•Brings structure to execution

•Improves sales coordination and follow-through

•Enables the company to scale efficiently

title: Seeking Experts for Feedback:Bilingual Parents, and Sport Enthusiasts (NFL amaerican football Book Focus)
description:
Looking for Beta Readers: "The Inspiring NFL Stories For Kids"



Hello!!!



We’re a growing educational publishing team at Petite Dreamer, creating "human-crafted," engaging books for children—especially those in multilingual and multicultural families who may find traditional books boring. Right now, we’re looking for thoughtful experts and beta readers to provide detailed feedback on our newest title: "The Inspiring NFL Stories For Kids: 24 Epic Tales of Grit".



We are especially interested in those with a passion for NFL, any sports and personal or professional experience in coaching, sports education, or children's literature.



About the Book:



Beyond the Stats: Unlike typical sports books that focus on dry numbers, this book focuses on "Grit"—the failures, heartbreaks, and the "4 AM" workouts that make a champion.



Epic Tales of Grit: Features 24 stories of NFL G.O.A.T.s, including Kobe Bryant’s "Mamba Mentality," Larry Bird’s early morning repetitions, and Michael Jordan's "Breakfast Club".



Engaging Format: Includes 100+ facts, trivia, "Grit Checks," and interactive quizzes designed to grab the attention of reluctant readers.



Multilingual Support: Written to support bilingual/multilingual households and encourage "Future Legends" at home.



We’re looking for someone who:



Has experience writing professional feedback or editorial content for children's books.



Can provide constructive insights that resonate with parents, educators, and young sports fans.



Understands the value of resilience-based non-fiction for kids.



Has experience as a teacher, bilingual parent, or a deep background in the Sport niche (coach, player, or super-fan).



Bonus if you:



Have personal experience teaching or parenting bilingual children.



Have written or edited children’s sports books or educational non-fiction.



Are familiar with the "Mamba Mentality" or the history of Sport, Football(NFL) legends.



What You’ll Get:



A full PDF copy of the book in advance.



An opportunity to join our growing team of collaborators (with potential future projects across stories, facts, trivia books, and more).



How to Apply:

Please send a brief summary of your experience with Sport and children’s education/literature. Mention if you are a bilingual parent or educator!

title: Inbox Manager– High Volume Messaging
description:
We’re looking for a sharp, fast, and reliable Inbox Manager to handle high-volume conversations across
, SMS, and chat platforms.



This is not a passive role — you’ll be actively engaging, qualifying, and moving conversations forward in real time.



What You’ll Be Doing:

-Responding to inbound messages quickly and professionally

-Managing high daily message volume (hundreds to thousands/day)

-Qualifying leads based on simple criteria

-Tagging, organizing, and updating conversations in CRM

-Escalating hot opportunities to the sales team

-Keeping response times fast (ideally under 2–5 minutes)



Requirements (Non-Negotiable):

-Fluent English (written + comprehension) — must sound natural and human

-Strong ability to understand context and reply appropriately

-Stable internet connection (no frequent disconnects)

-Ability to work in fast-paced, high-volume environments

-Detail-oriented and organized

-Available for consistent shifts (include your availability when applying)



Bonus Points If You Have:

-Experience in customer support, sales, or chat-based roles

-Familiarity with CRMs (GoHighLevel, HubSpot, etc.)

-Experience handling leads or appointment setting

-Fast typing speed



Compensation

$4/hour base



Bonuses based on:

Speed of replies

Quality of conversations

Qualified leads generated



Top performers will have opportunities for increased hours, higher pay, and long-term roles.



How to Apply



Include the following:



A short voice note introducing yourself (to confirm English fluency)

Your internet speed (screenshot preferred)

Your availability (hours + timezone)

Any relevant experience

Important



We’re building a high-performance team. If you’re slow to respond, inconsistent, or need constant supervision, this won’t be a fit.



If you’re fast, sharp, and reliable — you’ll do very well here.

title: PPC Specialist – Amazon Marketing Agency
description:
PPC Specialist – Amazon Marketing Agency (Remote)



Full-Time | Remote | Competitive Salary + PTO



About Us:



The Amazon Whisperer is a fast-growing, full-service Amazon marketing agency that delivers profitable sales growth for consumer brands. We specialize in Amazon SEO, PPC, listing optimization, and catalog management, and we do it with systems, strategy, and speed. We’re looking for a PPC Specialist who wants to grow into a world-class media buyer by executing and managing high-performing Amazon ad campaigns.



The Role:



The PPC Specialist plays a hands-on role in the day-to-day execution of Amazon advertising campaigns. You’ll be responsible for uploading bulk files, adjusting bids and budgets, building campaigns, harvesting keywords, and ensuring PPC performance stays aligned with ACoS, TACoS, and budget targets. This is a perfect fit for someone who wants to master the technical side of Amazon ads and learn how to run efficient, scalable campaigns from the ground up.



You’ll work directly under the PPC Lead, taking direction on strategy while owning the implementation across multiple client accounts.



Responsibilities:



- Work closely with the PPC Lead to implement strategies across client accounts

- Create new campaigns (SP, SB, SD) and restructure existing ones for efficiency

- Adjust bids, update budgets, and modify placement settings

- Harvest high-performing keywords and promote them into new campaigns

- Apply negative keyword targeting to eliminate wasted ad spend

- Track and maintain campaign health daily to ensure accounts remain within budget

- Monitor and flag issues with ACoS, TACoS, or unexpected spend spikes

- Harvest PPC data to support organic SEO initiatives

- Maintain clean data and reports in spreadsheets and tracking tools



Requirements:



- Minimum 2 years of Amazon PPC experience (SEO knowledge is a plus)

- Proficiency in Helium 10, Data Dive, Jungle Scout, or similar keyword tools

- Strong analytical mindset and comfort working with performance data

- Must be proficient in Google Sheets and Excel

- Experience using automated ad platforms like Trellis, Adlabs, Bidx, Teikametrics, Quartile, Perpetua, or other similar sofware

- Clear communication skills for working with team leads and managers

- Reliable and organized, able to manage multiple campaigns without hand-holding

- Fast and reliable internet connection

- Fluent English (written and spoken)

- Ability to type 55+ words per minute



Company Culture:



At The Amazon Whisperer, we highly value transparency, communication, and trust. This is not just another job, it’s a place where your ideas are valued, hard work is rewarded, and growth opportunities are everywhere. We’re building a team that operates like a unit. Supportive, proactive, and relentlessly focused on client success. If you’re looking for a long-term remote role where you can grow your skills and career, you’re in the right place.



What You’ll Get:



- Competitive pay

- 13 days PTO (including public holidays)

- 100% remote work

- Opportunity to grow into roles like PPC Lead and beyond

- A collaborative and growth-minded team environment



Apply today and be part of a company that’s scaling fast and doing things differently in the Amazon space. We’re not looking for average. We’re looking for exceptional.



Submit your application here:

The Amazon Whisperer is a fast-growing eCommerce marketing agency helping consumer brands scale profitably on Amazon and other marketplaces. We work with a large volume of brands and rely on clean, accurate data to identify high-potential opportunities.

Flexible hours

Who This Role Is Best For: 

Entry-level virtual assistants

Those comfortable doing repetitive tasks efficiently

title: Customer Service Representative (CSR) – Pest Control Scheduling & Customer Support Specialist
description:
Zunex Pest Control is a fast-growing, family-owned pest control company serving residential customers across multiple states. We are committed to delivering high-quality service, reliable pest solutions, and exceptional customer experiences. Our team operates with a strong focus on professionalism, efficiency, and long-term customer relationships. As we continue to expand, we are looking for dedicated individuals who want to grow with a service-driven and results-oriented organization.



Job Description

We are seeking a highly organized and customer-focused Customer Service Representative (CSR) to join our team. This role is responsible for managing customer interactions, scheduling services, handling billing inquiries, and supporting overall operations. The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced environment, communicates effectively, and is proactive in solving problems while enhancing the customer experience.



Soft Skills 

Strong communication and interpersonal skills

High attention to detail and organization

Problem-solving and critical thinking ability

Ability to multitask in a fast-paced environment

Proactive and team-oriented mindset



Basic Skills

Proficiency in Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets) or Microsoft Office (Word, Excel)

Basic computer navigation and data entry skills

Strong typing and documentation skills

Ability to learn and adapt to new systems and tools



Required Technical Skills and Experience

Experience in customer service, call handling, or support roles

Experience using CRM systems (preferably FieldRoutes or similar)

Strong written and verbal English communication skills

Experience with scheduling, dispatching, or coordination tasks

Ability to manage multiple communication channels (phone,
, SMS)



Desired Technical Skills and Experience

Experience in pest control, home services, or field service industries

Familiarity with Voice for Pest or similar phone systems

Experience in billing, collections, or account management

Sales or upselling experience in a service-based business

Experience with customer retention or win-back strategies



Detailed Responsibilities

Answer incoming calls,
s, and messages from customers regarding services, billing, and scheduling

Schedule, reschedule, and confirm appointments based on technician availability

Maintain accurate and detailed customer records in FieldRoutes

Coordinate with technicians and operations teams to ensure efficient service delivery

Handle customer concerns, cancellations, and retention efforts professionally

Conduct outbound follow-ups and win-back calls to previous customers

Assist with billing inquiries, payment collections, and account support

Identify upsell opportunities and promote additional services when appropriate

Ensure customers are informed about service expectations and preparation requirements

Monitor customer satisfaction and escalate issues when necessary

Collaborate with internal teams to support daily operations and workflow efficiency



Samples of the Type of Work You Expect

Responding to customer inquiries and scheduling services efficiently

Handling cancellation requests and successfully retaining customers

Updating CRM records with accurate service notes and account details

Conducting follow-up calls to ensure customer satisfaction

Coordinating with technicians to resolve scheduling conflicts



Work Schedule and Holidays

Working hours: 8:00 AM – 4:30 PM MST

Includes one (1) 30-minute paid lunch break and two (2) 15-minute paid breaks daily

Five (5) paid holidays per year (employee may choose preferred holidays, subject to approval)



Perks and Benefits

Paid Time Off (PTO) accrual

Opportunity for performance-based bonuses or incentives

Growth opportunities within the company

Supportive and team-oriented work environment



Trainings Provided

Initial onboarding and system training (FieldRoutes, Voice for Pest, internal tools)

Ongoing support and coaching to improve performance

Access to internal SOPs and process documentation



Career Potential

This role offers strong growth potential within Zunex Pest Control. High-performing CSRs may advance into leadership, operations, dispatch, or account management roles. Opportunities for increased compensation and responsibility are based on performance and company growth.



Details on How to Apply

To apply, please submit your resume along with a short message explaining your customer service experience and why you would be a great fit for Zunex Pest Control.

title: Knowledge Base & Data Organization Specialist (Remote)
description:

---



## ???? ABOUT THE ROLE



We are hiring a **detail?oriented Knowledge Base & Data Organization Specialist** to help us build a **centralized strategy and intelligence library** used for:



- Business strategy development  

- AI agent systems  

- Automation and decision?support tools

This role is about **accuracy, structure, and consistency**.



You will be responsible for organizing, tagging, and maintaining text?based data (strategies, chats, frameworks, prompts) inside Microsoft 365 tools so they can be safely used by AI systems in the future.



---



## ? WHO THIS ROLE IS PERFECT FOR



You will do very well in this role if you:

- Pay close attention to details

- Follow rules exactly as written

- Prefer structured work over creative work

- Can move quickly **without cutting corners**



---



## ? THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF



- You guess when unsure instead of flagging issues  

- You prefer creative or design?focused tasks  

- You dislike documentation or structured data  

- You need constant supervision to stay on task  



---



## ???? YOUR MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES



- Upload strategy assets and chat transcripts into Microsoft SharePoint

- Apply **strict formatting and naming conventions**

- Tag each file using predefined categories and metadata

- Ensure **version control** (never overwrite files)

- Preserve **original content exactly as provided**

- Add summaries and notes **without changing source material**

- Flag unclear or conflicting information (do not guess)

- Maintain a clean, audit?ready knowledge library



---



## ???? TOOLS YOU WILL USE



- Microsoft SharePoint

- OneDrive

- Microsoft Word (and/or Markdown format)

- Microsoft Teams (for instructions)



? All tools will be provided  

? No paid software required on your side



---



## ???? REQUIRED SKILLS & QUALIFICATIONS



**Required**

- Strong written English (reading comprehension more important than writing style)

- Experience with **data entry, documentation, or knowledge management**

- Excellent attention to detail

- Ability to follow written SOPs exactly

- Comfortable working independently



**Nice to Have (Not Required)**

- Experience with SharePoint or document libraries

- Familiarity with tagging, categorization, or research work

- Experience working with structured content (guides, SOPs, manuals)



---



## ? PERFORMANCE EXPECTATIONS



To succeed in this role, you must:

- Maintain **high accuracy**

- Work consistently (daily progress expected)

- Ask questions by flagging notes — **not by stopping work**

- Protect data integrity at all times



Speed matters — but **accuracy is non?negotiable**.

## ???? APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (VERY IMPORTANT)

## ???? GROWTH OPPORTUNITY



This role can expand into:

High performers will be trusted with more responsibility.

## ? FINAL NOTE



This is a **long?term system build**, not a one?time task.

title: Pacific Admin Solutions Social Media & Growth VA - Pickleball App
description:
Social Media & Growth VA – Pickleball App



Young, Scrappy Content & Community Manager Needed for Fast-Growing Pickleball App



Do you want to help a pickleball Apple Watch app blow up on TikTok, Instagram, and Reddit?



Then let's talk.



Don't miss this.

-Get in on the ground floor of a growing sports tech app with real 
ntum

-Work directly alongside the founder — your impact will be immediate and visible

-Big opportunities for the right person as the app scales

-Long-term position with a clear path from part-time to full-time

-Be trained and shaped by someone who knows how to grow apps

-Work from home, on your own terms

-Real creative ownership — this isn't just posting, it's building something



We built an Apple Watch app specifically for pickleball players to track their games, stats, and progress. Pickleball is one of the fastest-growing sports in the US — and we're building the go-to tool for players who take their game seriously.



We want you to play a huge role in helping us grow. This is an exciting long-term opportunity, and as you grow, the role can grow with you.



So, are you ready?



JOB OVERVIEW

Main Responsibilities and Skills Needed:

-TikTok, Instagram, and Reddit content posting and community engagement

-Engagement farming — creating and distributing content designed to drive likes, comments, shares, and saves

-Organic community outreach and messaging across social platforms

-Supporting AI-based marketing automations (tools and training provided)

-Staying current on pickleball trends, viral content, and platform algorithm changes

-Tech savvy — comfortable learning new tools quickly

-Solid written English — natural, conversational, native-sounding



Here are specific examples of what you'll be handling week to week:

-Post and manage content on TikTok, Instagram, and Reddit accounts

-Engage with the pickleball community — comment on posts, respond to DMs, join conversations

-Conduct direct outreach via DM to pickleball content creators and active players

-Monitor and participate in Reddit pickleball communities (r/pickleball, etc.)

-Flag trending content and 
nts in the pickleball world to capitalize on

-Support and maintain AI automation workflows

-Report weekly on what's working, what's not, and what to try next



DESCRIPTION OF IDEAL CANDIDATE

Young and Social Media Native

You grew up on TikTok and Instagram. You understand how content moves, what makes people stop scrolling, and how communities actually talk to each other. You don't need to be told what's trending — you already know.



AI-Fluent, Not AI-Dependent

You know how to use AI tools to work faster and smarter — whether that's for research, scheduling, automation, or ideation. But you also know the difference between content that feels human and content that screams "AI wrote this." We have zero tolerance for AI slop. If you use AI, it's a tool, not a ghostwriter.



Gets Stuff Done

You take charge and make things happen. You don't make excuses. You have an internal drive to grow something and you'll do whatever it takes.



Self Starter

You're self-motivated and happy working independently. You don't sit around waiting to be told what to do next.



Creative

You have an eye for what will resonate with an audience. You know the difference between content that flops and content that hits — and you're always thinking about how to make the next post better than the last.



Solves Problems

When something isn't working, you figure out why and try something different. You don't wait to be told.



Takes Ownership

You love having responsibility. You want to be the person who makes something succeed.



Growth-Minded

You're always learning. You stay on top of platform changes, new tools, and what's working in the social media space right now.



You Do What You Say

If you commit to something, you follow through. Simple as that.



COMPANY CULTURE

We're direct and transparent. We work hard, move fast, and have fun doing it. You'll work closely with the founder — communication is open and feedback is immediate. If something isn't working, we talk about it and fix it.



PAY

200–250 PHP per hour, based on ability and experience. Part-time (~10 hours/week) to start, with a direct path to full-time based on results. If you believe you have more to offer, tell us what you'd like and why.



CANDIDATE REQUIREMENTS

-Honest and reliable

-Strong written English — natural, conversational tone

-Actively uses TikTok, Instagram, and Reddit personally (not just professionally)

-Comfortable with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, automation platforms, etc.) — but creates original, human-feeling content

-Own computer with reliable internet connection

-Comfortable with video calls during late US Pacific Time hours



Working Hours

Part-time (~10 hours/week). Preferred overlap with late US Pacific Time (evenings PST / mornings PHT).



HOW TO APPLY

Message a short cover letter + resume as a response to this job post.



To apply, start your cover letter and your onlinejobs.ph message response header with: "Pickleball Ready"



Also please send a short video (2 minutes max, Loom or YouTube link) introducing yourself and telling us: what's one piece of content you've seen recently that you thought was genius, and why? No templates — make it personal.



We look forward to working with you.

title: Appointment setter — outbound sales (websites & AI receptionist)
description:
Booked AI helps businesses grow with professional websites and AI-powered receptionists that handle calls, book appointments, and capture leads — 24/7, without hiring extra staff. We're expanding fast and need driven appointment setters to get us in front of the right business owners



What to do

Research and build lead lists of local businesses that would benefit from a website or AI receptionist

Make outbound cold calls and send follow-up messages to business owners and decision makers

Pitch the value of our services in a clear, friendly, and confident way

Book qualified discovery calls or demos directly into our calendar

Track your outreach activity and results in a shared CRM or spreadsheet

Meet daily/weekly targets for calls made and appointments set.



What we're looking for

At least 1 year of experience in cold calling, appointment setting, or outbound sales — B2B preferred

Excellent spoken and written English — confident, clear, and professional on the phone

Not afraid of rejection — you stay positive and keep dialing

Self-motivated with the ability to work independently and hit targets

Basic computer skills — Google Sheets, Zoom, CRM tools (training provided)

Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace for calls



Nice to have

Experience selling digital services (websites, SEO, software, or SaaS)

Familiarity with AI tools or tech products

Experience with US, UK, Australian, or Canadian clients



How to apply

To be considered, please send the following when you apply:



A brief intro about your outbound sales experience

A voice recording (Vocaroo or Loom) of a 30-second cold call introduction — imagine you're calling a small business owner to sell them a website

Your available hours and preferred timezone

Applications without a voice recording will not be reviewed. We want to hear your voice!



How you get paid

Small base — $2–$3/hr

Just enough to keep the lights on while you ramp up. This is not where the money is.

$5 per qualified appointment booked

Every confirmed call you book with a real decision maker pays $5. Book 3 per day = $75 extra/week on top of base.

Bonus when your appointment closes a deal

Website deal closes ? +$25 bonus. AI receptionist deal closes ? +$50–$75 bonus. You get paid when we get paid.



What a strong week looks like

20 hrs worked

Base: ~$50

15 appts booked

Appt bonus: $75

3 deals close

Close bonus: $100+

Week total

~$225+ for 20 hrs

title: Telemarketing Representative – Insurance Renewals
description:
We are seeking a motivated Telemarketing Representative to make outbound calls to homeowners whose insurance policies are approaching renewal. The primary responsibility of this role is to connect with prospective clients, confirm policy renewal details, and schedule or facilitate insurance quotes over the phone with our agency. The ideal candidate will be comfortable speaking with homeowners, identifying opportunities to provide competitive insurance options, and helping generate new business for the agency through proactive outreach.



Key Responsibilities:



Make outbound calls to homeowners with upcoming insurance policy renewals.



Introduce our agency and present the opportunity to review and quote their homeowners insurance policy.



Gather basic policy and property information from prospects.



Qualify leads and transfer interested prospects to a licensed agent or assist with initiating the quote process.



Maintain accurate call notes and prospect information in the agency’s CRM system.



Follow up with prospects when needed to complete quotes or schedule consultations.

Strong communication and phone skills.



Comfortable making a high volume of outbound calls.



Sales or telemarketing experience preferred (insurance experience is a plus).



Ability to build rapport quickly and professionally with homeowners.



Organized and detail-oriented with the ability to track prospect information.

- Provide strategic financial guidance to clients.

title: Operations Lead
description:
We’re hiring our first Operations Lead—a strategic doer who’s ready to roll up their sleeves and build from the ground up. In the early stages, this role will be hands-on: managing day-to-day operations, creating SOPs, supporting client delivery, and refining internal processes. As the business scales, this person will transition into a leadership role, building and managing a remote team of CSRs, Project Managers, and Admins to support our growing client base.



This is a rare opportunity to shape the operational backbone of a healthcare startup from day one.



Key Responsibilities:

Program Execution & Client Support

- Oversee the delivery of dietary and exercise counseling programs to partner clinics

- Serve as the primary point of contact for medical clients, ensuring smooth onboarding, service delivery, and ongoing support

- Translate clinical goals into operational workflows that are scalable and patient-centered



SOP Development & Process Building:

- Create and refine SOPs for service delivery, client onboarding, reporting, and internal coordination

- Identify gaps and inefficiencies, and implement improvements that support quality, compliance, and scalability

- Document best practices and build operational playbooks for future hires



Wearing Multiple Hats:

- Contribute to marketing strategy and planning, including the creation of high-quality marketing materials

- Build internal processes from zero, laying the groundwork for scalable operations across departments

- Collaborate cross-functionally to support evolving business needs beyond core operations



Team Building & Leadership (Future Phase):

- Once business demand increases, recruit and onboard remote support staff (CSRs, Admins, Project Managers)

- Train and manage the team to uphold service standards and client satisfaction

- Foster a culture of accountability, empathy, and continuous improvement



Operational Oversight:

- Create and monitor KPIs such as client satisfaction, task completion, turnaround time, and engagement metrics

- Ensure compliance with healthcare standards and client-specific requirements

- Support billing, scheduling, and reporting functions as needed.



Qualifications

- 2+ years of experience in leadership, operations, client success, or program management

- Proven ability to build systems from scratch and thrive in a startup environment

- Strong communication skills - verbal and written

- Highly organized, proactive, and adaptable to shifting priorities

- Experience managing remote teams or cross-functional projects is a plus

title: Marketing Coordinator (Full-time remote work, earn up to USD 1,600)
description:
Background



The Reliability Academy delivers world-class online training and coaching to clients and students across the globe. To date, we have helped 100+ companies, and trained 2000+ industry professionals, across 50+ countries in all major industries. Founded in 2018, we are headquartered in Brisbane, Australia but work virtually with most of our team based in the Philippines.



Please note this role is advertised as based in the Philippines but we are open to applications for people anywhere in the world.



About Us



Our customers are in all parts of the world, from individuals to large multinational companies. We have big plans and are working to deliver our online training in 8-10 different languages to better serve our customers. We believe in being a force for good and that means:



- building a great company with a strong focus on our values and behaviors. We are building a small, but mighty team that truly enjoys working together and delivers a world-class product and experience to our customers.

- serving our niche to the best of our ability and reaching those less fortunate than us. To that purpose, we have launched the Reliability Academy Scholarship Program enabling students in developing nations to access our training with a 75% Scholarship

- aligning our company mission and vision to the United Nations Sustainable Development Goals



The company is growing with a small team of full-time and part-time contractors working across the Asia-Pacific region, currently all reporting to the General Manager, also based in the Philippines whilst our Managing Director is based in Brisbane, Australia. We deliberately hire talent in different regions of the world to keep costs down, create diversity, and build a multi-lingual team.



Role Purpose 



The Marketing Coordinator is responsible for driving online sales growth through B2C marketing initiatives, with a focus on optimizing existing systems, improving conversion performance, and ensuring every campaign contributes directly to revenue. 



This role will oversee the Affiliate Program, manage lead segmentation using RightMessage, and conduct a full audit and optimization of HubSpot
 sequences—including welcome and nurture workflows—to ensure maximum engagement and conversion. 



The Marketing Coordinator will also manage and monitor paid campaigns to drive online course sales and continually refine strategies based on data and performance insights. 



Responsibilities  



As Marketing Coordinator your initial responsibilities will consist of: 



Demand Generation and Strategy 



-Develop and execute marketing strategies aligned with company goals, focusing on driving online B2C conversions. 

-Plan and manage marketing campaigns, PPC campaigns primarily for B2C (Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads,
 Ads)

-Continuously monitor, test, and tweak campaigns to optimize results and maximize performance.

-Use RightMessage to manage lead segmentation, ensuring the right message reaches the right audience (B2B and B2C). Monitor performance, refine targeting, and adjust settings as needed by leveraging analytics / insights from Segmetrics. 



Affiliate Program Management 



-Oversee and manage the company’s Affiliate Program using TrackDesk.

-Test and validate system functionality, ensuring affiliates are properly tracked and rewarded.

-Monitor affiliate performance, identify top-performing partners, and develop strategies to drive participation and conversions. 



 Marketing and Automation 



-Review, audit, and optimize
 sequences and workflows within HubSpot, including welcome sequences and nurturing campaigns. 

-Identify opportunities to improve engagement and conversion rates. 

-Make recommendations for adjustments and implement approved changes. 

-Ensure marketing automation and workflows support the company’s inbound marketing and lead nurturing goals. 



Marketing Analytics and HubSpot Management 



-Develop and maintain a marketing performance dashboard to track key metrics, such as lead volume, conversion rates, and website traffic. 

-Integrate and manage HubSpot, cold
 systems, and campaign tracking tools for marketing automation, lead tracking, and reporting. 

-Analyze performance data to optimize campaigns and recommend improvements. 

-Report on marketing activities and outcomes to the General Manager and Managing Director. 





What Success Looks Like 



Succeeding in this role will mean the Marketing Team establishes a steadily growing flow of online course sales, supported by consistent brand visibility and engagement across all channels.  



Success will be measured by the following metrics: 



-Affiliate Program is fully operational and generating measurable conversions. 

-RightMessage segmentation is active and optimized for effective lead targeting. 

-HubSpot workflows and sequences are running efficiently and driving engagement and sales. 

-LinkedIn page is active with regular, relevant posts that maintain engagement and brand trust. 

-Paid campaigns on Google, LinkedIn, and
 achieve an average 
 of 3x or higher. 

-Overall marketing performance shows measurable improvement in lead quality, conversion rates, and ROI. 

 



About You 



Knowledge and skills are important, but we will primarily hire based on attitude and behavior. We are looking for someone who: 



-Is self-motivated and proactive with a positive attitude and a great work ethic. 

-Takes ownership of their work and is results-driven, constantly seeking to improve and optimize. 

-Communicates clearly and effectively, both with internal teams and external stakeholders. 

-Has a deep understanding of inbound marketing strategies and can balance creativity with data-driven decisions. 

-Enjoys working remotely and thrives in a remote, collaborative environment and is comfortable managing a distributed, diverse team.   

-Is passionate about inbound marketing and embraces data-driven decision-making. 



Your Skills 



Your knowledge, skills and experience: 



-Proven experience in inbound and outbound marketing, and demand generation. 

-Strong digital marketing skills: PPC ads (Google, LinkedIn,
), SEO, outbound (cold
 / LinkedIn outreach) 

-Experience managing marketing performance metrics and reporting on results. 

-Experience with HubSpot Marketing Solution is a requirement; Candidates with experience on Segmetrics, RightMessage and TrackDesk (or similar tools) will be given stronger consideration. 

-Experience in PPC campaign management (Google Ads, LinkedIn Ads,
 Ads). 

-Excellent organizational and project management skills. 

-Excellent copywriting and proof-reading skills.  

-You are fluent in English with excellent written and verbal communication skills. Your written English is clear, concise, and accurate. 

-A sound understanding / experience with automation tools and AI (LLMs, agents) would be a bonus, as would experience in leading/managing/coordinating a team 



What’s on Offer



This is a long-term virtual role allowing you to work from home. You will work during Australian business hours i.e. your workday will fall between 7 am to 7 pm GMT+10 to ensure overlap with the rest of the team (who are based in the Philippines). There will be a 3-month probation period.



Base pay between USD 1,000 and USD 1,600 per month depending on experience and skills, with a 13th-month pay in December, 20 days of paid leave, an annual allowance of USD 1,000 towards Private Health Insurance and a chance to earn a performance bonus up to 3 months of salary (subject to business and personal performance).



Applying



If you are interested, please complete the online application (see link below) summarizing your background, experience, and what makes you an excellent candidate for the role. Tell us about yourself, your skills, and why you’re interested in working with us.



Application form: 



This is an important requirement for Reliability Academy, and we would love to have someone on seat as soon as possible, but we will take our time to find the right candidate. That means we will be shortlisting and interviewing soon after this job post has gone live and will continue until we find the right candidate. Therefore, this job could stay open for several weeks or close quickly



Please note, that if you do not apply via the above application form your application will not be considered. We appreciate people who pay attention to detail so please mention the words “Green Banana” when we ask about your aspirations in life.

title: Google Ads Campaign Manager
description:
JOB TITLE

Google Ads Campaign Manager | Strategy, Launch, Optimization, Reporting)



OVERVIEW

We’re looking for a results-driven Google Ads Campaign Manager who can build paid campaigns from start to finish (Search, Performance Max, Display, YouTube) 



This role is ideal for someone who is both strategic and highly execution-oriented: you can build campaigns from scratch, manage budgets responsibly, optimize performance weekly, and produce clean, client-ready reporting that connects spend to measurable outcomes.



RESPONSIBILITIES

+ Campaign Strategy + Setup

  + Plan and launch paid campaigns end-to-end across Google Ads, Meta, and LinkedIn

  + Build campaign structures aligned to goals (lead gen, conversions, pipeline, ROAS)

  + Develop and implement:

    + Keyword strategy (incl. match types, negatives, audience layering)

    + Ad groups and ad formats (RSA, PMax assets, retargeting, etc.)

    + Conversion tracking and event setup (GA4 + GTM preferred)

    + Budget pacing strategy and bid strategy selection



+ Creative + Messaging Collaboration

  + Write or refine ad copy aligned to funnel stage and intent

  + Coordinate with internal team for landing page needs, creative, and brand alignment

  + Ensure CTAs, offer messaging, and lead flow match campaign objectives



+ Optimization + Performance Management

  + Monitor campaigns daily/weekly to improve performance and reduce wasted spend

  + Improve key metrics such as:

    + CPL / CPA

    + Conversion rate

    + CTR and Quality Score (Google)

    + Lead quality feedback loop

  + Run structured testing (A/B creative, copy, audiences, landing pages)

  + Identify issues quickly and fix tracking or funnel breakdowns without delays



+ Reporting + Insights

  + Deliver performance reporting that is clear, actionable, and decision-focused

  + Track results against agreed KPIs and explain what changed, why, and what you’ll do next

  + Provide weekly summaries and monthly reports including:

    + Spend + pacing

    + Conversions + CPL/CPA

    + Top performing campaigns/ad sets/keywords

    + What you tested

    + Next actions and priorities



REQUIRED SKILLS

+ Google Ads expertise (must-have): Search + conversion-driven structure and optimization

+ Strong working knowledge of Meta Ads Manager and LinkedIn Campaign Manager

+ Tracking + attribution fundamentals: GA4, GTM, conversion events, UTMs

+ Clear reporting skills and ability to explain results to non-technical stakeholders

+ Strong attention to detail: budgets, naming conventions, consistent QA checklist habits

+ Comfortable managing multiple campaigns and deadlines



NICE TO HAVE

+ Experience with B2B lead gen and longer sales cycles

+ Landing page optimization experience (CRO fundamentals)

+ HubSpot campaign tracking, lead routing, and CRM reporting basics

+ Looker Studio dashboard experience or repeatable reporting templates



TOOLS YOU’LL USE

+ Google Ads, Google Analytics 4 (GA4), Google Tag Manager (GTM)

+ Meta Business Manager / Ads Manager

+ LinkedIn Campaign Manager

+ Looker Studio (preferred), Google Sheets/Excel

+ HubSpot (a plus)



DELIVERABLES & EXPECTATIONS

+ Launch campaigns cleanly with proper tracking and QA

+ Provide weekly optimization actions (not just status updates)

+ Produce monthly reporting that is presentation-ready

+ Maintain documentation: campaign structure, targeting rationale, test log, key changes



APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS (MUST SUBMIT)

+ Short summary of your paid ads experience:

  + Channels you manage (Google, Meta, LinkedIn)

  + Typical monthly budgets managed

  + Types of campaigns (lead gen, ecommerce, B2B, local, etc.)



+ Report sample (required)

  + Share one example of a paid ads performance report you’ve delivered to a client or internal team

  + You may redact the client name and any sensitive details

  + PDF, Google Doc, or screenshots are fine



  The report sample must include:

  + Date range covered

  + Spend + pacing

  + Conversions + CPL/CPA (or ROAS if ecommerce)

  + Breakdown by campaign (or top 3 campaigns)

  + What was tested or changed

  + Action plan / next steps



+ Optional (helpful)

  + Screenshot of a campaign structure you built (Google Ads preferred)

  + Simple dashboard example (Looker Studio, Sheets, etc.)



COMPENSATION

Paid, based on experience and scope. Ongoing work available for the right person.



To Apply:

Send an
 to 
 along with your CV.

title: Platform/Systems Engineer
description:
We Don't Need Another Backend Developer. We Need an Architect Who Builds Systems That Don't Break.

Platform / Systems Engineer



Most engineers write code. You'll build the orchestration backbone that powers everything else.

About Rescale Media



We're not just another e-commerce company. We're a brand incubator on a mission to build enduring, value-driven brands that bring meaningful products into families' lives.

We've scaled from just drop shipping to a 30+ person team doing $1M+/month. Our goal? Multi 9-figures. And we're just getting started.

???? Learn more at 
dia



Our Core Values

???? GENIUSES & OWNERS We partner with builders who think like founders. Not employees waiting to be told what to do—owners who see a problem and fix it.

? ITERATIONS > HOURS We don't measure success by time at your desk. We measure it by how fast you can test, learn, and improve. Ship it. Learn. Repeat.

???? TRUTH OVER EGO We prioritize honesty and clarity, even when it's uncomfortable. No politics. No BS. Just data and results.



The Mission

Build and own the workflow orchestration backbone.

You'll be responsible for the systems that make everything else possible—reliable, scalable, and resilient infrastructure that processes thousands of jobs without breaking a sweat.



What You'll Do

Design and implement stateful workflow execution systems

Own job lifecycle management from start to finish

Build bulletproof retry logic, timeout handling, and failure recovery

Optimize for throughput and cost efficiency

Ensure systems gracefully handle edge cases and failures

Document and maintain critical infrastructure



What We're Looking For

3+ years of backend/platform engineering experience

Strong experience with workflow orchestration (Temporal, Airflow, Step Functions, or similar)

Deep understanding of distributed systems and state management

Experience building fault-tolerant systems with retry logic and error handling

Proficiency in Python, Go, or Node.js

Familiarity with message queues and event-driven architecture



Bonus Points:

Experience with high-throughput systems

Background in e-commerce or marketing tech

Kubernetes/containerization experience

You've been on-call and know what it means to build systems that let you sleep



This Role Is NOT For...

We're being direct because we respect your time:

Engineers who only want to write code, not own systems

Those who haven't dealt with production failures at scale

Anyone who thinks "it works on my machine" is an acceptable answer

People who can't explain trade-offs in system design



Compensation & Benefits

???? Monthly Salary: $2,000/month

Plus:

Monthly performance bonuses tied to company Operating Profit (5-25% of salary)

Quarterly profit pool distribution (2-7.5% of company profits shared among team)

Remote-first environment

Work with a team of A-players who actually give a damn

Direct founder access—no layers of bureaucracy

Real ownership of your domain—we don't micromanage



Our Hiring Process

We don't waste time—yours or ours. Here's how it works:

Step 1: Application (You're here!)

Step 2: Task Test - Design a configurable workflow that processes a job through multiple stages with retries and state tracking

Step 3: Interview with Founder

Step 4: WhatsApp update for next steps

Step 5: Signing of Independent Contractor and NDA

Step 6: Onboarding and Training

Total timeline: 1 week from application to offer.



Ready to Apply?

???? Apply here:

[  
  ]

Complete the application form above. Be thorough—this is your first impression.



P.S. We're hiring 2 engineers for this role. If you've ever built a system that handled millions of jobs and you're proud of how it recovered from failures, we want to hear about it.

P.P.S. If you're reading this far, you're already more thorough than 90% of applicants. That's exactly who we want.

title: Website Builder VA (Bolt.new – Screen Recording Required to Apply)
description:
We are hiring a Website Builder VA to help us produce high-quality websites at scale using Bolt.new.



This is a production role, not a creative role.



You will be responsible for taking structured instructions and building websites quickly and accurately using our templates and systems.



What You’ll Be Doing:

- Building websites using Bolt.new

- Following exact templates and layouts (no guessing or creativity required)

- Adding text, images, and sections based on provided instructions

- Getting each site to ~80–90% completion

- Preparing sites for final review by our senior builder



This Role Is NOT For You If:

- You want to “design” or be creative

- You struggle to follow structured instructions

- You are slow with tools or technology

- You need constant guidance



This Role IS For You If:

- You are fast, efficient, and detail-oriented

- You can follow instructions exactly

- You are comfortable learning and using new tools

- You can work independently and hit daily output targets



Daily Expectations:

- Build multiple websites per day (speed matters)

- Maintain consistency across all builds

- Follow SOPs exactly



Compensation:

- Hourly (based on experience)

- Performance bonuses available based on output and accuracy.



REQUIRED TO APPLY (READ CAREFULLY):



To be considered for this role, you MUST submit a screen recording showing you building a website using Bolt.new. 



Instructions:

Build a simple website (any business – e.g., plumbing, landscaping, etc.)

Set up the site

Input content

Structure the layout

Requirements:

title: $2/hr + $20–$100/lead = ~$11/hr: Real Estate Motivated Seller Lead Generator
description:
Real Estate Motivated Seller Lead Generator

100% Remote | Unlimited Earning Potential

U.S. Real Estate Investment Marketing Company



Location: 100% Remote — Work From Anywhere. Part-time, and Full-time is welcomed.

Pay Structure: $20–$100 USD per qualified lead submitted (no cap)

Hourly Base: $2/hr

Average Earnings: ~$11/hr for reps submitting just 2 leads/day, 5 days/week

Payment Schedule: Bi-weekly via direct transfer

Start Date: ASAP



About the Company:

We are the highest-paying real estate investment marketing company that generates motivated seller leads for real estate investors across the United States. We work fast, we value accuracy, and we pay immediately upon lead approval. We are a small, lean team — no bureaucracy, no waiting around. If you perform, you get paid and you grow with us.



Why This Role Stands Out:

No hourly cap. No income ceiling. You earn $22–$100 per qualified lead with zero limit on how many you can submit. The only thing limiting your income is how many leads you generate.



Real earning example: A rep submitting just 2 leads per day at our average payout of $40/lead earns $80/day — that is approximately $11/hr on a standard 40-hour work week, working 5 days a week. Reps who submit more leads or generate higher-quality leads that land in the $50–$100 range earn substantially more. Our top individual VA makes >$2,500/week.



What You Will Be Doing:

Your job is straightforward:

• Generate motivated seller leads across the United States using any legal method you choose (cold calling,
 outreach,
 ads, SEO, direct mail, referrals, etc.)

• Qualify each lead to our specifications — the seller must verbally confirm on a recorded line (1) they are interested in selling and (2) they are willing to have someone view the property within 14 days OR speak with an investor by phone within 7 days

• Verify the lead is not a duplicate already in our system before submitting

• Submit the lead through our internal dashboard along with a call recording and qualifying information

• Receive instant payout upon lead approval



That is the entire workflow. Generate. Qualify. Verify. Submit. Get paid.



How You Generate Leads Is Up to You

We do not tell you how to find leads. This role is ideal for people who specialize in one or more of the following:

• Cold calling

•
 outreach

•
 / social media advertising

• SEO or content marketing

• Direct mail

• Referral networks

• Any other legal outbound or inbound method



Important: You are responsible for sourcing and funding your own leads list, dialer, and any other tools you use. We do not provide dialers. We do sell cold call lists at cost if you need them — contact us for pricing. We do not mark up the list cost.



Compensation Structure:

Base + Commission

Lead Payout Range: $22–$100 USD per qualified lead (based on quality and lead type)

Average Payout: $40 per lead

Payout Cap: None — unlimited submissions, and unlimited income

Payout Timing: Instant upon lead approval

Payment Method: Bi-weekly direct transfer



Team / Affiliate Program

You can bring reps on under you and earn a lifetime commission on every lead your team submits. You set the split with your sub-reps (for example, 50/50, 60/40 — you pick ) and simply notify us of the agreed-upon split when onboarding them. We manage all payroll for your team. You do not have to chase payments or manage the administrative side — we handle it entirely. This is ideal for:

• Recruiters

• Affiliate marketers

• Sales team leads or managers

• Anyone who wants to build a passive income stream from team production



Quality Requirements and Account Standing

We pay well because we expect quality. Here is how quality is measured and what happens if it drops:



88%+ Quality Rate (2-week average): No restrictions. Unlimited lead submissions.



Below 88% Quality Rate (2-week average): Account is capped at a fixed number of lead submissions per day until quality rate returns above 88%.



Below 80% Quality Rate (2-week average): Account is paused and placed on a 60-day probation period.



Lead Refund / Clawback Policy

We take lead quality seriously. Accounts can be banned if leads are found to be invalid. This mirrors the industry-standard refund criteria. Leads are subject to commission clawback for any of the following reasons:

• Property is actively listed on the MLS at the time of submission

• Property has not been listed for the past 12 months

• Lead is a duplicate already in our system

• Property is a mobile home on leased land

• Lead was submitted by a wholesaler, not the actual property owner

• Property is vacant land

• Property is non-residential (commercial, industrial, agricultural, etc.)

• Address is invalid, non-existent, or cannot be verified

• Contact information (phone/email) is fake or entirely incorrect

• Lead is confirmed spam or bot-submitted

• Seller confirms they never requested an offer and have no intent to sell

• Contact is not the property owner or an authorized representative

• Lead falls outside our active acquisition markets

• Seller explicitly states they are not selling, confirmed on follow-up

• Seller has high price expectations (more than 135% of market value)

+ This includes sellers who were never thinking about selling but would sell for a excessively high asking price.



Submitting consistently poor-quality or fraudulent leads will result in permanent account termination.



Tools and Technology

Get cash-back on technology you are already using when you are working with us!

Calling Platform: Your own — you are responsible for your dialer and phone system.

-Get a discounted Kixie dialer here: 
/m2sr5mhgu08h

-SmrtPhone, ReadyMode, and more!

Leads List: Your own — we sell lists at cost if needed; we do not provide lists for free.

-Get a discounted PropStream/BatchDialer account here: 
/rizzly/

-Datasift, and more!



How to Apply — Read Carefully

We review every application carefully. Incomplete applications are automatically disqualified. To be considered, you MUST submit all of the following:



Required Application Materials

1. Your resume or verified work history (PDF preferred)

2. A voice or video recording (2–4 minutes) answering ALL THREE questions below — text-only responses will not be reviewed

3. A written statement at the end of your application confirming: "I have read and understand the compensation structure, quality requirements, refund policy, and account standing terms outlined in this job posting."



Video / Voice Recording Questions (Answer All Three)

Question 1: Walk me through exactly how you plan to generate motivated seller leads. What is your strategy, what tools will you use, and why do you believe your approach will work?



Question 2: Describe a time you generated leads or found potential customers for any product or service. What did you do, what was the result, and what did you learn?



Question 3: A homeowner says they are interested in selling but won't be ready for 6 months. How do you categorize this lead? What do you do with it? Does it qualify for submission?



Disqualification Notice

Applications submitted without a recording, without the written confirmation statement, or that do not answer all three questions will not be reviewed — no exceptions.



We are a small, fast-moving team.

We value accuracy, reliability, and honesty above all else.

If that describes you — and you are ready to earn based on results — we want to hear from you.

-Get a discounted PropStream/BatchDialer account here: 
/rizzly/

-Datasift, and more!



How to Apply — Read Carefully

We review every application carefully. Incomplete applications are automatically disqualified. To be considered, you MUST submit all of the following:



Required Application Materials

1. Your resume or verified work history (PDF preferred)

2. A voice or video recording (2–4 minutes) answering ALL THREE questions below — text-only responses will not be reviewed

3. A written statement at the end of your application confirming: "I have read and understand the compensation structure, quality requirements, refund policy, and account standing terms outlined in this job posting."



Video / Voice Recording Questions (Answer All Three)

Question 1: Walk me through exactly how you plan to generate motivated seller leads. What is your strategy, what tools will you use, and why do you believe your approach will work?



Question 2: Describe a time you generated leads or found potential customers for any product or service. What did you do, what was the result, and what did you learn?



Question 3: A homeowner says they are interested in selling but won't be ready for 6 months. How do you categorize this lead? What do you do with it? Does it qualify for submission?



Disqualification Notice

Applications submitted without a recording, without the written confirmation statement, or that do not answer all three questions will not be reviewed — no exceptions.



We are a small, fast-moving team.

We value accuracy, reliability, and honesty above all else.

If that describes you — and you are ready to earn based on results — we want to hear from you.

title: Real Estate Operations Coordinator – Top 10 Advance!
description:
Real Estate Operations Coordinator – Top 10 Advance!



We’re a fast-growing land investing company, and we need someone to bring structure and 
ntum to our operations. You’ll work directly with the owner, be involved in real deals, and help us scale. You’ll also support our rental property business as needed.



If you’re organized, proactive, and excited to use AI to solve problems and move faster — we’ll give you the tools and opportunity to grow. This role has the potential to become an Operations Manager position as we scale.





What You’ll Be Doing



- Bookkeeping — categorize expenses, reconcile accounts, keep clean financials in QuickBooks

- Transaction coordination — work with title companies, vendors, and county offices to keep deals moving

- Follow-up & accountability — make sure tasks and deadlines don’t slip across the team

- KPI tracking — build simple reports so we always know where things stand

- Research — find realtors, vendors, and service providers as needed

- CRM management — keep deal data accurate and organized

- Automation — use AI tools to eliminate repetitive work and improve efficiency



You’re a Fit If Your



- Organized and detail-obsessed

- Proactive — you follow up without being asked

- Resourceful — you figure things out and get it done

- Comfortable making calls and working with professionals

- Ownership mindset — you don’t need daily hand-holding

- Growth-oriented — you want to learn and take on more over time

QuickBooks experience is a plus, but not required if you’re willing to learn.



The Details



- Full-time, US business hours, remote

- Reports to the owner, working alongside our sales lead

- Compensation: Competitive, based on experience



How to Apply

We don’t hire off resumes — we hire off results.



Complete our skills challenge. See your score and live ranking instantly on our public leaderboard. **Top 10 advance to a paid project task.**



???? [START THE CHALLENGE USING LINK BELOW]
