title: General Program Manager
description:
To be considered, you must fill out the application form below:





We are seeking a dynamic and talented General Program Manager to join our team. This role is perfect for a highly intelligent, motivated individual who is passionate about leveraging technology to make a difference in healthcare.



What is Ansible Health?

Ansible Health unites physicians, nurses, respiratory therapists, and tech experts from Columbia, Johns Hopkins, Google, Amazon, and other top institutions to revolutionize care for chronic disease patients. We combine elite clinical expertise with cutting-edge technology to deliver personalized, efficient care at scale. Our team's groundbreaking research, published in leading journals like Nature and PLOS, demonstrates our commitment to innovation. Backed by Bessemer, First Round Capital, AlleyCorp, Breyer Capital, and Inflect Capital, we're a Series A startup partnering with leading healthcare systems nationwide. Our mission is to genuinely improve patient outcomes, not just optimize metrics. If you're passionate about transforming healthcare through technology, join our diverse team in making a real impact.



The Job at a Glance

We're seeking a super smart, hungry, and resilient individual who is passionate about technology and healthcare to join us as a Program Manager. The ideal candidate thrives in a fast-paced, ambiguous environment and brings a strong organizational mindset to complex projects. You will be responsible for overseeing multiple complex programs across various departments to ensure successful delivery within scope, timeline, and budget. This role requires a self-motivated individual who can work independently and adapt to the dynamic nature of a growing startup in the healthcare technology space.



Responsibilities

- Impact the strategy and execution for AnsibleHealth's general operations, clinical operations, and technology initiatives, working closely with cross-functional teams.

- Work independently on projects through the full life cycle, overseeing clinical, operational, and technology aspects.

- Develop and manage program plans, schedules, budgets, and resource allocation to ensure successful delivery.

- Define program scope, objectives, and success criteria in collaboration with stakeholders and cross-functional teams.

- Establish program governance structures and processes, including risk management, issue management, and change management.

- Monitor and report on program progress, status, and performance to stakeholders and executive leadership.

- Ensure effective communication and alignment with stakeholders at all levels.

- Continuously identify and mitigate program risks and issues.

- Facilitate program-related meetings and workshops.

- Develop and maintain strong relationships with stakeholders to drive program success and identify growth opportunities.

- Bring a continuous improvement mindset to our operations to ensure we're ready to scale.

- Anticipate issues, propose solutions, manage dependencies, and identify areas for tool/process improvement.

- Collaborate with and steer internal teams, including Marketing, Engineering, Program Management, and Clinical Operations.



The ideal candidate should be comfortable to be in a constantly changing role with a high level of ambiguity - as we are a fast-moving startup operating in an ever-evolving environment. He or she should have excellent analytical, communication and management skills to succeed in this role.



Education

Bachelor's degree from one of the top five universities in the Philippines.



Required Qualifications and competencies

- Fresh graduates are welcome to apply; 0-5 years of relevant work experience is an advantage but not required.

- Demonstrated passion for technology and ability to quickly adapt to new digital tools and platforms.

- Exceptional organizational skills.

- Resilient mindset with the ability to bounce back from challenges and thrive in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.

- Keen interest in healthcare and improving patient outcomes; prior healthcare experience is a plus but not mandatory.

- High intellectual curiosity and a hunger for personal and professional development.

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to think critically and creatively.

- Proficiency in Google Workspace and willingness to learn new software tools as needed.

- Self-motivated with the ability to work independently and as part of a team.

- Adaptable and comfortable with ambiguity in a startup environment.

- Eagerness to take on leadership roles and initiative to drive projects forward.

- Ability to influence and collaborate with stakeholders at all levels.

- Strong attention to detail and commitment to delivering high-quality work.

- Enthusiasm for continuous learning and process improvement.



The ideal candidate is a highly intelligent, motivated individual who is passionate about leveraging technology to make a difference in healthcare. We're looking for someone who can bring fresh perspectives, adapt quickly to new challenges, and contribute to our innovative and fast-paced work environment.



Job Details

Full-time: 40 hours a week, with flexible PTO and healthcare benefits.

Location: Remote (offshore, and willing to work Eastern hours)

title: Healthcare Technical Support
description:
To be considered, you must fill out the application form below:


/ansiblehealth/17b2a6df-a72d-480e-8c91-daa3830ac000



What is Ansible Health?

Ansible Health unites physicians, nurses, respiratory therapists, and tech experts from Columbia, Johns Hopkins, Google, Amazon, and other top institutions to revolutionize care for chronic disease patients. We combine elite clinical expertise with cutting-edge technology to deliver personalized, efficient care at scale. Our team's groundbreaking research, published in leading journals like Nature and PLOS, demonstrates our commitment to innovation. Backed by Bessemer, First Round Capital, AlleyCorp, Breyer Capital, and Inflect Capital, we're a Series A startup partnering with leading healthcare systems nationwide. Our mission is to genuinely improve patient outcomes, not just optimize metrics. If you're passionate about transforming healthcare through technology, join our diverse team in making a real impact.



The Job at a Glance

As a Technical Product Support Specialist, your primary responsibility is to provide patients with exceptional technical support for our products and services. You will daily engage non-tech-savvy patients on technical phone calls. Most of our patients are older adults located in the USA. These calls involve guiding patients through using their Android tablet and verifying it in the backend through Samsung Knox, ensuring that RPM devices are connected and transmitting accurate data, and assisting them in joining their appointments through our tablet via Zoom. Occasionally, patients may require additional help during their time in our program. In some instances, verifying data through Azure (Device Analytics and CosmosDB) may be necessary.



Furthermore, you will provide technical support to our clinical team, and ensure they are prepared for their virtual appointments. They may also require assistance using Athenahealth, such as modifying visits and checking in/out. You will handle general general technical support duties, which demand a solid understanding of our tech stack and products (i.e., Android Tablet, Zoo
etings and phone, Google Workspace). You should be capable of providing basic troubleshooting steps and assistance to remove obstacles for clinicians/support staff in their work, and are expected to be able to have on-call availability for urgent situations where patient care is affected.



Collaborating closely with our Engineering Team is also an essential aspect of your role to effectively escalate issues requiring broader coordination and resolution. GitLab and Azure DevOps are the primary ticketing systems used for filing issues and requests. Continuous follow-ups and monitoring are expected until the issue is resolved end-to-end. In addition, you are expected to be able to present and take notes on meetings about issues encountered in Tech.



The ideal candidate should be comfortable navigating ambiguity due to the ever-evolving nature of our startup. To excel in this role, excellent problem-solving, communication, and organizational skills are essential.



A Technical Product Support Specialist is expected to:

• Maintain a reliable, high-speed internet connection

• Handle Tech Support requests filed by clinicians or patients from end to end

• Manage and organize various project tools (e.g., GitLab, AzureDevOps, spreadsheets, bug trackers, documents)

• Conduct Tech Calls for non-tech-savvy patients (mainly older adults) in the USA

• Guide patients through Android tablet usage and confirm settings through Samsung Knox

• Work with RPM devices to ensure they are connected and transmitting accurate data

• Collaborate with Engineering Team and Program Managers to escalate and resolve issues

• Assist clinicians and company support staff with technical issues

• Run queries and check analytics using Azure’s CosmosDB or Device Analytics

• Become extremely familiar with our proprietary app, tablets, RPM devices, and backend systems.

• Support clinical team with equipment setup and checking applied security policies

• Present and take notes on Technical meetings, specifically on issues encountered and plans to resolve them.



Qualifications and Experience

• Prior experience in a customer support role, such as Technical Support Specialist or Support Engineer

• Expertise in Android Tablets, Samsung Knox Suite, and Knox Manage

• Proficiency in managing Zoo
etings and Zoom Phone

• Familiarity with medical devices (e.g., Blood Pressure monitor, Pulse Oximeter)

• Knowledge of Athenahealth preferred

• Experience using issue tracking software and remote support tools (e.g., Gitlab, Azure DevOps) is a plus

• Understanding of technology systems, particularly Google Workspace

• Positive, enthusiastic attitude and excellent English language skills (C2 level)

• Skilled in technical debugging techniques (e.g., analyzing metrics and logs on Azure)

• Strong written and verbal communication, problem-solving skills, and detail-oriented

• Ability to manage multiple priorities effectively

• Healthcare setting experience advantageous



Type of Role

Full-time: 40 hours a week (Monday - Friday; 9pm - 6pm EST/EDT)

Benefits: Flexible PTO and HMO coverage.

Level: Mid-Career, 3-5 years relevant work experience

Location: Remote

title: Medical VA / Onboarding Specialist
description:
To be considered, you must fill out the application form below:


/ansiblehealth/2475d4d7-7ed7-449e-a350-75eb5484b5db





What is Ansible Health?

Ansible Health unites physicians, nurses, respiratory therapists, and tech experts from Columbia, Johns Hopkins, Google, Amazon, and other top institutions to revolutionize care for chronic disease patients. We combine elite clinical expertise with cutting-edge technology to deliver personalized, efficient care at scale. Our team's groundbreaking research, published in leading journals like Nature and PLOS, demonstrates our commitment to innovation. Backed by Bessemer, First Round Capital, AlleyCorp, Breyer Capital, and Inflect Capital, we're a Series A startup partnering with leading healthcare systems nationwide. Our mission is to genuinely improve patient outcomes, not just optimize metrics. If you're passionate about transforming healthcare through technology, join our diverse team in making a real impact.



The Job at a Glance

We are looking for a top-tier Patient Care Coordinator to become an integral part of our expanding team. This role is vital in delivering the best care possible to our patients, handling patient communications, and providing essential support to our clinical staff in their mission to offer exceptional care. The ideal candidate will demonstrate exemplary professionalism, excellent English language communication skills, and outstanding organizational abilities with meticulous attention to detail. This position offers an exciting opportunity to contribute significantly to our patient-centric approach in healthcare delivery.



Responsibilities

• Customize initial discussions based on patient needs, ensuring they understand how the program can address their specific health conditions, providing personalized benefits rather than general services.

• Manage inquiries through multiple communication channels (phone,
, etc.), including voi
 inbox management and message routing, providing prompt and accurate responses.

• Process and manage referrals, working towards efficient conversion within a 7-10 day timeframe while managing multiple referral loop processes for a large patient panel.

• Perform comprehensive data entry including clinical survey scores/results, diagnostic tests, remote physiologic monitoring (RPM), and remote therapeutic monitoring (RTM) data streams.

• Schedule and coordinate patient appointments while maintaining communication with patients regarding their care schedule.

• Manage and process inbound and outbound medical records, ensuring proper documentation and organization.

• Maintain accurate EMR records by updating care notes, face sheets, and ensuring the integrity of patient information.

• Attend clinical meetings, take detailed notes, and follow up on action items and project timelines.

• Collaborate with a multidisciplinary team of physicians, engineers, designers, and care tea
mbers to continuously improve patient care delivery.

• Resolve patient issues and complaints, identifying problems and finding appropriate solutions to ensure patient satisfaction while maintaining professional communication throughout the process.



The ideal candidate for this role at Ansible Health is a dynamic professional who thrives in a fast-paced, ever-changing startup environment. They should also possess exceptional English communication skills, both written and verbal, coupled with meticulous attention to detail and strong organizational abilities. They should be adept at managing multiple priorities, from patient onboarding to referral management.



Required Qualifications and Competencies

• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field, such as Nursing, Physical Therapy, or other healthcare-related fields.

• 2+ years of professional experience in a customer service or healthcare setting, demonstrating a deep understanding of patient care and care coordination.

• Solid grasp of the US healthcare system and its intricacies.

• Exceptional written and verbal English communication skills.

• Strong attention to detail, organizational skills, and ability to multitask in a fast-paced environment.

• Proficiency with CRM systems, EMR software, and standard office applications (e.g., Google Suite)

• Training or experience in clinical medicine, such as a nursing degree, nursing assistant, or clinical scribe.

• Typing speed of at least 60 words per minute.

• Reliable internet connection (at least 30 Mbps) and a quiet home environment for work

• Ability to work in US time zones (EST)

• Achieve daily call quotas of 75-100 interactions.

• Adhere to established performance metrics to qualify for incentive plans tied to performance.



Nice to have

• Experience in the healthcare industry or with medical terminology.

• Proven track record in sales.

• Familiarity with remote patient monitoring systems.

• Knowledge of HIPAA regulations and healthcare privacy practices.



Job Details

Full-time: Full-time: 40 hours a week (with a possible shifting schedule including weekends)

Benefits: Flexible PTO and HMO coverage

Location: Remote (offshore, and willing to work US hours - EST/EDT)

title: Amazon Catalog Manager (Seller Central Expert)
description:
Full-Time | Remote | Long-Term Position



We are a growing U.S.-based premium brand seeking an experienced Amazon Catalog Manager to take full ownership of our Amazon listings, catalog health, and optimization strategy.



This is not an entry-level role. We are looking for someone who understands Amazon deeply — including catalog structure, indexing, variation strategy, flat files, and Seller Central troubleshooting.



If you are analytical, proactive, and focused on improving listing performance, we want to work with you long-term.



---



## Your Role



You will be responsible for the overall health, optimization, and performance of our Amazon catalog. Your work will directly impact organic rankings, conversion rates, and revenue growth.



You will fully own the catalog.



---



## Core Responsibilities



### Catalog Management



* Create and optimize listings (Titles, Bullet Points, Descriptions, Backend Search Terms)

* Build and manage parent-child variations correctly

* Perform bulk updates using flat files (required skill)

* Fix suppressed listings and catalog errors

* Resolve stranded inventory issues

* Maintain listing compliance with Amazon policies

* Manage and update A+ Content



---



### Amazon SEO & Optimization



* Conduct advanced keyword research (Helium 10, DataDive, or similar)

* Improve indexing and organic rankings

* Monitor keyword performance and adjust strategy

* Increase conversion rates through listing improvements

* Analyze competitors and identify ranking opportunities



---



### Image Strategy & Coordination (No Design Required)



You will own the image optimization process, but you will not personally design graphics.



* Conduct image audits to improve click-through rate and conversion rate

* Analyze competitor images and identify improvement opportunities

* Create detailed image briefs for designers (infographics, lifestyle images, comparison charts, feature callouts)

* Coordinate with designers and photographers to ensure brand consistency

* Ensure all images comply with Amazon policies

* Upload and manage image order within listings

* Continuously improve images based on performance data



---



### Seller Central Management



* Open and manage Seller Support cases

* Handle Brand Registry-related issues

* Monitor listing health dashboards

* Ensure correct category placement and attributes



---



## Required Experience



* 3+ years managing Amazon Seller Central

* Strong flat file experience (mandatory)

* Deep understanding of Amazon SEO and indexing

* Experience fixing suppressed listings

* Strong variation strategy experience

* Strong written English skills

* Ability to work independently without constant supervision



---



## Preferred (Bonus) Experience



* Experience working with branded or premium products

* Experience with Brand Registry

* Experience significantly improving conversion rates

* Strong data-driven mindset



---



## Compensation



* Competitive monthly salary (based on experience)

* Performance-based bonuses

* Long-term opportunity

* Growth potential into senior operations role



---



## Work Details



* Full-time

* Remote

* Flexible schedule (some overlap with U.S. hours preferred)

* Long-term commitment required (no short-term freelancers)



---



## How to Apply (Important)



To be considered, please send:



1. A short summary of your Amazon experience

2. 2–3 examples of listings you have optimized

3. A brief explanation of how you improve indexing

4. Your expected monthly salary

5. The phrase “CATALOG OWNER” at the top of your application

6. SEND US LINK TO YOUR CV/RESUME WITH WORK HISTORY



Applications without the required phrase will not be reviewed.



---



We are building a serious team and looking for someone who takes ownership, thinks strategically, and executes at a high level.



If that’s you, apply now.

title: Cold Calling Appointment Setter – Commission Only

Full Time Role: Willing to work 6 - 8 hours per day (up to 40 hours per week)

Timezone: Must be available to work any time during U.S. business hours Monday - Friday 

(approx. 8 AM EST/5 AM PST to 8 PM EST/5PM PST).

Some Experience: Previous outbound B2B cold calling experience is highly preferred. You must be comfortable with rejection and able to handle objections smoothly.

Perfect English: You must have a clear, neutral accent. You will be speaking with U.S. based business owners who have low tolerance for spam calls.

Tech: Your own phone or laptop (w/ high quality headset preferred), a quiet workspace, and a fast internet connection.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
Overview



AdminWiser is seeking a skilled and creative Social Media Manager to oversee social media presence for our agency and our diverse roster of clients. This role requires someone who can manage multiple brands at once, produce engaging content, communicate with clients professionally, and stay ahead of trending strategies that drive real business results.



Key Responsibilities

Content Strategy & Planning



Develop monthly content calendars for AdminWiser and assigned client accounts.



Research each client’s brand, services, and target audience to create tailored content strategies.



Present content ideas, hooks, and campaign themes to clients for approval.



Content Creation & Execution



Create high-quality posts, Reels, TikToks, and Stories using Canva, CapCut, or similar tools.



Write clean, engaging captions and CTAs aligned with each client’s brand voice.



Edit and repurpose footage from clients (transport videos, team highlights, testimonials, day-in-the-life clips, etc.).



Ensure all content meets quality standards before posting.



Social Media Management



Manage daily posting and scheduling through Meta Business Suite or preferred tools.



Respond to comments and messages professionally on behalf of clients.



Monitor brand mentions and maintain positive community engagement.



Ensure consistent branding across all platforms (Instagram,
, TikTok, LinkedIn, YouTube).



Client Communication



Attend weekly or biweekly check-ins with clients to review performance and content plans.



Collect and organize content materials from clients (photos, footage, updates).



Provide clear communication, updates, and recommendations to improve social media performance.



Deliver monthly analytics reports showcasing growth, insights, and next steps.



Analytics & Performance Tracking



Analyze performance metrics (reach, comments, follower growth, leads generated).



Identify which posts perform well and adjust strategy accordingly.



Track KPIs for each client’s goals (bookings, brand visibility, engagement, hiring).



Prepare monthly client reports with insights and improvement plans.



Brand Development



Maintain AdminWiser’s social presence, highlighting client wins, team features, behind-the-scenes, and BPO services.



Implement creative storytelling techniques that strengthen client branding.



Assist in creating marketing materials for clients (flyers, hiring posts, digital ads).







Qualifications



1–3 years of social media management experience (agency experience is a plus).



Strong copywriting skills and ability to adapt tone for different brands.



Proficient in Canva, CapCut, Meta Business Suite, TikTok, and basic video editing.



Highly organized and able to manage multiple clients at once.



Strong understanding of engagement strategies, trends, and analytics.



Excellent communication skills; comfortable talking with clients.



Ability to work under deadlines and produce quick-turnaround content.







What We’re Looking For



Someone who is reliable, consistent, and detail-oriented.



A creator who loves building brands and helping small businesses grow.



A strategic thinker who can analyze data and adjust accordingly.



A fast learner who can understand multiple industries (NEMT, beauty, food, lifestyle, etc.).



A team player who fits AdminWiser’s culture of quality, professionalism, and efficiency.

title: Virtual Assistant — General Admin & Operations Support
description:
We're looking for a resourceful and detail-oriented virtual assistant to help with a variety of day-to-day administrative and operational tasks. This is a flexible, remote role that suits someone who enjoys juggling different kinds of work and takes pride in keeping things organized and polished.



You'll work directly for one of the owners and be trusted to handle tasks independently once you understand his preferences and workflow.



What you'll be doing

General admin & odd jobs



Research tasks — finding information, compiling summaries, comparing options

Booking appointments, travel, reservations, and scheduling

Managing inboxes and drafting responses or follow-ups

Miscellaneous tasks as they come up — think of yourself as a right hand

Content cleanup & online posts



Proofreading and lightly editing social media posts, listings, or web copy

Formatting and tidying up posts for consistency in tone and appearance

Updating or correcting existing online content as directed

Spreadsheet work



Building and maintaining Google Sheets or Excel files

Data entry, cleanup, and organization

Creating basic formulas, filters, and formatting for easy reading



What we're looking for:

Excellent written English

Strong attention to detail

Self-directed and reliable

Comfortable asking clarifying questions

Solid Google Sheets / Excel skills

Experience with admin or VA work

Good judgment and common sense

Stable internet connection

Compensation & hours



Pay Competitive, discussed at interview — paid weekly via OFX



Hours Flexible, roughly 10–20 hrs/week to start · may grow based on fit



Timezone Overlap with US Central Time (CST) preferred for at least a few hours daily



Pre-interview task:

To be completed before your interview and submitted with your application. 



Takes roughly 30–45 minutes. This helps us see how you approach real work — there's no single right answer.



Task instructions

1 Spreadsheet cleanup



Copy the Google Sheet with messy data (inconsistent formatting, duplicate entries, missing values) found here: 

Clean it up, add a summary row with totals or averages where relevant, and leave a note in a comment explaining one decision you made.



2 Post cleanup & rewrite



Below is a short social media caption with errors and awkward phrasing. Rewrite it so it reads cleanly and professionally, while keeping the same message: 

"great deals on our new products!! dont miss out its a limited time thing. buy now!!!! so exicted for you guys to try this"



3 Mini research task



Find three well-reviewed restaurants in Pensacola, FL suitable for a business lunch (indoor, good parking, not a chain). Summarize each in 2–3 sentences covering cuisine, atmosphere, and why it works for a business setting. Present your results in a simple table.



4 Submit your work



Send a single document (Google Doc or PDF) with your completed tasks, plus a brief note (3–5 sentences) about how you'd typically handle managing multiple small tasks from different requests in one day.

title: Business Development Associate
description:
We're a Tampa-based painting and drywall company expanding our B2B client base. We need someone to help us build relationships with general contractors, restoration companies, and remodeling firms.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

- Make 50-80 outbound calls daily to construction companies in Tampa and surrounding areas

- Qualify leads and schedule meetings with decision-makers

- Track all interactions in HubSpot CRM

- Test and refine messaging based on what's working

- Follow up consistently with prospects



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

- Strong phone communication skills (you'll be calling US business owners)

- Comfortable with high-volume outbound calling

- Self-starter who can problem-solve without constant direction

- Resilient — rejection is part of the job

- Available to work 9am-5pm EST



THIS ROLE INCLUDES:

- Daily check-ins with leadership to align on strategy

- Collaborative work style (not a "work in silence" role)

- 60-day trial period to ensure mutual fit



COMPENSATION:

- $2,500/month base + performance-based commission

- Realistic total earnings: $5-9K/month once ramped



TO APPLY:

Record a 2-3 minute video answering:

1. Record a 30-second mock cold call. You're calling a Tampa restoration company owner. Your goal: get him interested enough to stay on the line. Start the call right now - go.

2. You've made 50 calls today using the same pitch and it's not working. What do you change tomorrow, and how do you figure out what to test?

3. I give you the name of a construction company in Tampa. Walk me through - out loud, right now - how you'd research them and figure out what to say when you call.

title: Shopify Post Purchase CRO Specialist
description:
Who We Are:



At Escend Media, we help D2C brands implement retention strategies that increase profit and drive customer retention. We want to be the ‘who’ behind
s that people ask ‘dannngg, who designed that’.



What We Do:

We help 7 and 8 figure ecommerce businesses develop, optimize and scale their owned media marketing efforts. Whether they are just looking to start
 marketing, they need to really refine what they are currently doing or they need someone to take
 marketing off their shoulders, we’re here to help them so that they can focus on running the business.



Our clients are leaders in their industry and have built strong relationships with the customers they serve. Our job is to ensure that their brand image stays consistent online and offline and, more importantly, that their business is growing.





Summary of The Position:



The Shopify Post Purchase CRO Specialist is responsible for the strategic implementation and optimization of post-purchase upsell funnels, primarily utilizing platforms like Aftersell. This role focuses on enhancing Average Order Value (AOV) and Customer Lifetime Value (CLTV) for Direct-to-Consumer (DTC) e-commerce brands by creating highly relevant and effective post-purchase offers. The specialist will manage the full lifecycle of implementation, from strategic planning and A/B testing to performance monitoring and continuous optimization, ensuring seamless integration and alignment with brand objectives.



Responsibilities:



• Implement and manage post-purchase upsell funnels using platforms such as Aftersell, ensuring alignment with strategic objectives to increase AOV and CLTV.

• Conduct systematic A/B testing across various elements including product selection, offer and pricing structures, pricing angles, copywriting, psychological angles, user interface (UI) optimization, and customer segmentation.

• Monitor and analyze key performance indicators (KPIs) such as Acceptance Rate, AOV Lift, Incremental Profit/Session, and Upsell Conversion Rate, optimizing for Revenue Per Visitor (RPV) and Profit Per Visitor (PPV).

• Ensure technical and creative requirements are met for all implementations, including fulfillment safety (e.g., 'Order on Hold' feature), mobile responsiveness, brand consistency, and effective inventory management.

• Collaborate with marketing and design teams to ensure brand consistency and compelling offer presentation.

• Identify and avoid common pitfalls such as the 'Wall of Text' error and the 'Irrelevance' trap, focusing on clear value propositions and relevant offers.

• Leverage customer data, loyalty programs, and other add-ons to enhance post-purchase strategies and maximize incremental revenue.

• Continuously refine and improve post-purchase strategies based on performance data and evolving market trends.



Our Culture:



• No one is bigger than the team

• We don’t make excuses, we take responsibility

• Innovate everywhere

• Communicate. Communicate. Communicate. We have a culture of open communication.



Required Skills:



• Proven experience in implementing and optimizing post-purchase upsell strategies, preferably with platforms like Aftersell.

• Strong understanding of e-commerce metrics and their impact on business growth (AOV, CLTV, ROAS, RPV, PPV).

• Demonstrated expertise in A/B testing methodologies and data-driven optimization.

• Excellent attention to detail and a commitment to quality assurance in all implementations.

• Knowledge of mobile UI/UX best practices for e-commerce.

• Ability to analyze performance data and translate insights into actionable strategies.

• Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to articulate complex ideas clearly.

• Experience with project management software (e.g., Clickup) is a plus.

• Proactive approach with a sense of urgency and purpose in daily tasks.



Perks:

- Flexible working hours

- Remote working

- Room to grow - we're an early stage start up with a proven track record

- Competitive compensation

- Work with some amazing brands



This Role Is Perfect for You If…



- You love working as a team.

- You are a self-starter.

- You can work under pressure

- You have exceptional communication skills

- You are results/outcome driven.

- You have a ‘can-do’ attitude. If “that’s not my job” isn’t in your vocabulary, you’ll fit in great!



This Role is NOT the Right Fit For You If You Are…

- A ‘me first’ type of person

- Not a self-starter.

- Not a ‘people person’

- Problem driven, not solution oriented. If you complain about problems/issues/bottlenecks, without proposing a solution, this is not for you.

- Looking for a typical 9-5. If you hate Mondays, this is not for you. We’re a mission-driven company who are all about changing the lives and businesses that we work with. If we have something that needs to get done, we’ll have all hands on deck. Sometimes you might have to work late but sometimes you’ll get the afternoon off, it’s not all work no play, but we’re here to help business grow!

title: Property Management Bookkeeper
description:
We are a growing property management company seeking a detail-oriented and experienced Part-Time Billing Specialist to handle our monthly reconciliations, accounts payable (AP), and accounts receivable (AR) processes. This remote role is ideal for a proactive professional with a strong background in property management accounting. You will support our team by managing billing for properties, vendors, and tenants, ensuring accuracy and timeliness in all financial transactions. This is a part-time position, approximately 25 hours per week, during business hours, US Pacific Time zone.



Key Responsibilities:

- Perform monthly reconciliations of bank accounts, tenant ledgers, and vendor statements to ensure all records are accurate and up-to-date.

- Manage accounts receivable (AR), including generating and distributing invoices for rent, utilities, late fees, and other property-related charges; processing tenant payments; and monitoring aging reports to resolve discrepancies promptly.

- Handle accounts payable (AP), such as reviewing and processing vendor invoices, ensuring timely payments, and reconciling vendor statements.

- Collaborate with property managers and vendors to address billing inquiries, resolve issues, and maintain positive relationships.

- Assist with month-end closing procedures, including preparing financial reports and supporting audits as needed.

- Maintain organized billing records and documentation in compliance with property management regulations and best practices.

- Identify opportunities for process improvements in billing and accounting workflows.

- Other ad-hoc accounting tasks to support the property management team.



Requirements and Qualifications:

- Must have hands-on experience with Buildium property management software for managing transactions, tenant accounts, and financial reporting.

- Proficiency in QuickBooks Online (QBO) for bookkeeping, invoicing, reconciliations, and AP/AR management.

- Strong understanding of property management accounting principles, including tenant billing, vendor payments, and compliance with relevant regulations.

- Excellent data entry skills with high accuracy and attention to detail.

- Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite, particularly Excel (advanced skills preferred) for data analysis and reporting, as well as Google Workspace tools like Sheets and Drive.

title: Direct-Response Video Editor (TikTok/Reels Style) for Australian Agency
description:
About Us:

We are AT Media Partners, a fast-growing performance marketing agency based in Australia. We help home-improvement companies (builders, roofers, landscapers, plumbers) generate high-quality leads through paid advertising on
 and Instagram.



We don't do boring corporate videos. We create high-converting, direct-response video ads (9:16 vertical format) that stop the scroll and drive action.



The Role:

We are looking for a highly skilled, fast, and reliable Video Editor to join our team long-term. You will be taking raw footage provided by our clients (often shot on smartphones) and turning it into polished, high-converting video ads.



You will be editing 4 specific types of videos:



1.

Selfie / Talking Head Ads: Fast cuts, engaging captions (Hormozi style), sound effects, and b-roll overlays.



2.

Project Showcases: Smooth transitions, color grading, and text callouts highlighting specific features.



3.

Testimonials: Clean cuts, lower-thirds for names, and emotional pacing.



4.

Transformations (Before & After): High-energy, beat-synced edits with trending audio and dramatic reveal transitions.



Requirements:



•

Incredible Editing Skills: You must understand pacing, retention mechanics, and how to stop the scroll in the first 3 seconds.



•

Direct-Response Knowledge: You know how to edit for conversions, not just aesthetics. You understand the importance of hooks, CTAs, and visual pattern interrupts.



•

Text & Motion Graphics: Expert at creating dynamic, easy-to-read captions and text overlays that pop.



•

Speed & Reliability: We require a STRICT 24-hour turnaround time on standard ad edits. Our clients move fast, and we need our ads live quickly.



•

Software: Premiere Pro, After Effects, DaVinci Resolve, or CapCut Pro (as long as the final result is top-tier).



•

Communication: Excellent written English and the ability to follow detailed briefs.



What We Offer:



•

Consistent, long-term work with a growing Australian agency.



•

Clear briefs and organized workflows.



•

Opportunity to grow with the company and take on more responsibility.



•

Prompt payments.



How to Apply (IMPORTANT):

To be considered for this role, you MUST follow these instructions exactly:



1.

Start your application message with the word "TRADIE" so we know you read this entire post.



2.

Provide 3 links to your best direct-response or TikTok/Reels style video ads (do not send us long YouTube videos, gaming montages, or wedding edits).



3.

Confirm that you can consistently meet a 24-hour turnaround time.



4.

Let us know what editing software you primarily use.



Applications that do not follow these instructions will be ignored. We look forward to seeing your work!

title: Medical Receptionist
description:
This "final cut" is designed to be a filter. It uses aggressive, ownership-oriented language to signal that this isn't a standard, passive VA gig. It’s designed to attract the "Type A" personality and make the "passengers" scroll past.



---



## **Virtual Clinic Operations "Driver" (Front Desk & Billing Liaison)**



**The Headline: We don’t hire "Virtual Assistants." We hire Owners.**



If you are looking for a job where you sit in the background, wait for a task list, and stay silent until spoken to—**please do not apply.** We are a high-performance US-based clinic, and we are looking for a "Driver." 



In this role, you aren’t just answering phones; you are the **Air Traffic Controller** of our patient experience and the **Gatekeeper** of our revenue. You will manage our virtual front desk and act as the critical link between our providers and our outside billing agency.



### **The Mission**

1.  **Lead the Front Desk:** You provide an elite, high-urgency experience for patients via phone and video. There is zero "dead air." You are proactive, polished, and authoritative.

2.  **Own the Revenue Cycle:** You don't do the accounting, but you ensure the engine has fuel. You verify insurance *before* the visit, secure prior authorizations independently, and ensure our billing agency has "clean" data to process.

3.  **Financial Liaison:** You are comfortable discussing money. You will explain deductibles to patients and collect co-pays at the time of service with professional confidence.



### **Are you the 5%?**

Most offshore staff are "passengers"—they wait for instructions. We are looking for the 5% who take the wheel.

* **You don't ask "What do I do now?":** When it’s quiet, you are auditing tomorrow’s charts, scrubbing for insurance errors, or following up on missing info.

* **You are a "Detail Freak":** You understand that one wrong digit on an insurance card means the doctor doesn’t get paid. You catch the errors before they happen.

* **You Speak Up:** If you see a process that isn't working, you flag it. If a patient is unhappy, you solve it. You do not hide behind an
 or a chat box.



### **Requirements**

* **Elite English:** Your verbal and written English must be indistinguishable from a native speaker. You must be able to navigate complex US insurance phone trees and handle difficult patient conversations with ease.

* **Insurance Literacy:** Solid understanding of ICD-10/CPT codes, the prior-authorization process, and how to read a Verification of Benefits (VOB).

* **Tech Savvy:** Advanced proficiency in EMRs (**EPIC highly preferred**) and remote tools (Teams, Meet, Doxy).

* **Self-Correction:** You don't need a manager to find your mistakes. You find them, fix them, and ensure they don’t happen again.



### **Core Attributes for Success**

* **Urgency:** You treat a ringing phone or an empty schedule like an emergency.

* **Persistence:** You don’t stop at the first "no" from an insurance company. You follow through until the claim is cleared.

* **Total Ownership:** You treat this clinic as if it were your own business.



---



### **How to Apply (The First Test)**

We do not review "standard" applications. To be considered:

1.  Submit your resume and a **30-second voice recording** (or video) introducing yourself.

2.  In your message, tell us about one specific time you found a mistake that would have cost your previous employer money, and how you fixed it.



**If you do not include the voice recording, your application will be deleted immediately.**

title: Executive Assistant
description:
Executive Assistant Tax & Business Operations

Part-Time · GoHighLevel · Tax Prep Backend · Service Bureau a Plus



About the Role

We are a fast-growing tax preparation service bureau and business brand scaling toward 7-figures. We need a sharp, self-directed Executive Assistant who can operate independently, keep the business running smoothly, and handle both the administrative and technical sides of a professional tax office.



This is NOT a general VA role. You must understand how a tax preparation office actually runs from client file organization to workflow management  and be fluent in GoHighLevel (GHL) automation and CRM operations.



What You'll Do

Manage the CEO's calendar, inbox, and daily priorities

Run GoHighLevel automations, pipelines, and client communications

Oversee backend operations for the tax preparation office (client files, workflows, follow-ups)

Build and maintain GHL funnels, landing pages, and intake forms

Automate SMS/email sequences for client onboarding and follow-up

Organize and prepare client documents and tax files

Coordinate with tax preparers, coaches, and tea
mbers

Track tasks, deadlines, and deliverables across multiple projects

Prepare financial summaries and assist with monthly reporting

Handle miscellaneous executive support tasks as needed

You Must Have

GoHighLevel (GHL) experience — not optional

Tax preparation office experience

Strong CRM & pipeline management skills

Experience with TaxSlayer, Drake, or similar

Client file organization & document prep

Automation tools: Zapier, Make, or n8n

Excellent written English communication

High attention to detail & accuracy

Ability to work independently with minimal direction

Discretion with confidential client data



? Bonus: Service Bureau Experience ? Bookkeeping / P&L Familiarity

Do Not Apply If

You have never worked inside a tax preparation office or tax software

You only have general admin or social media VA experience

You have never used GoHighLevel

You are not comfortable handling sensitive client financial documents

You need step-by-step supervision to complete tasks

Why This Role

You will be the right hand of a CEO actively building toward $1M+ in revenue. This is a high-trust, high-growth role with room to expand your responsibilities as the business scales. If you are detail-oriented, tech-savvy, and know the tax world — this is your seat at the table.

title: Integration Specialist
description:
A resume is required to be considered.

Must be available to work U.S. Pacific Standard Time (PST) hours.

The contract will be managed through Deel, and work will be tracked using Hubstaff.



Position Summary



We are seeking an Integration Specialist to maintain and improve the integrations connecting our e-commerce sales channels, ERP, and fulfillment partners. You will act as the first line of defense, monitoring issues, triaging errors, and resolving problems before they impact operations.



What You'll Do



Monitor integrations across e-commerce and ERP systems for errors, failures, and data gaps.

Triage and resolve integration errors, escalating when necessary.

Perform configuration and mapping updates in our iPaaS platform, including sandbox testing and production deployment.

Review reconciliation reports and resolve discrepancies to keep order data accurate.

Identify recurring failure patterns and implement preventative fixes.

Support custom API based integrations and participate in regular team syncs.



What We're Looking For



Must have:



Strong understanding of integrations, including data mapping, field transformations, error handling, and flow logic.

Hands on experience with REST APIs and webhooks; comfortable reading API documentation and debugging requests.

Proven troubleshooting ability; follow records across systems, identify failures, and resolve them.

Ability to manage multiple open issues and prioritize effectively.

Comfortable working independently, documenting work clearly, and communicating with a remote team.



Nice to have:



Experience with an iPaaS platform such as Celigo.

Familiarity with e-commerce platforms or ERP systems.

Experience with sandbox to production deployment workflows.

Basic scripting skills, JavaScript or Python, for debugging or extending integration logic.

title: SEO Manager (Strategy & Growth) – Marketing Agency
description:
About Us



We are a growing marketing agency based in Canada that works with restaurants, retail brands, hospitality businesses, and local service companies, e-commerce and more.



Our team handles social media, paid advertising, content creation, and digital strategy for our clients. We are looking for an SEO Manager who can help us improve search visibility, drive organic traffic, and support long-term growth for our clients.



This is a long-term remote position with the opportunity to grow as our agency scales.



Responsibilities



You will be responsible for planning and executing SEO strategies across multiple client accounts.



Tasks include:



• Conducting keyword research and identifying growth opportunities

• Optimizing website content and structure (on-page SEO)

• Managing blog and content strategies for SEO

• Performing technical SEO audits and identifying issues

• Improving local SEO (Google Business Profiles, local rankings)

• Tracking rankings, traffic, and performance

• Providing clear recommendations to improve results



You will collaborate with our team responsible for content, ads, and web updates.



Platforms & Skills Required



Required:



• Strong understanding of SEO fundamentals

• Experience with keyword research and on-page optimization

• Understanding of technical SEO basics

• Ability to analyze SEO performance and make recommendations



Bonus experience:



• Local SEO (very important for our clients)

• Google Search Console

• Google Analytics

• SEO tools (Ahrefs, SEMrush, Ubersuggest, etc.)

• Experience with Squarespace or Shopify websites



Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who:



• Has 2+ years experience in SEO

• Understands how to drive real traffic and rankings (not just write blogs)

• Has experience with local businesses or service-based companies

• Can manage multiple client projects

• Is proactive and brings ideas to improve results

• Communicates clearly and consistently



Work Environment



Remote position.



You will work with our team through Whatsapp and project management tools.



Pay



Compensation will depend on experience and workload.



Opportunity for long-term growth and increased responsibility.



IMPORTANT – Application Instructions



To apply, please include:



A short introduction about yourself

Your experience with SEO

An example of a website you helped improve (and what you did)

What tools you typically use for SEO

The word “BOSS” at the top of your application so we know you read the full job post



Applications without the keyword will not be reviewed.

title: Executive Virtual Assistant – Farmers Insurance & Ministry Support (Part-Time)
description:
Job Title: Executive Virtual Assistant & Communicator (Insurance & Ministry)

Job Type: Part-Time (25 hours/week) 

Shift: US PST Business Hours (Graveyard Shift in PH)

Salary: $550 (Part-Time 25 hours/week)

OVERVIEW

We are seeking a high-level Executive Virtual Assistant/Manager to serve as the "Administrative Engine" and Communicator for a Principal managing a Farmers Insurance Agency, a religious ministry (Church of Scientology), and a private family office.

This is not a typical "task-based" VA role. We are looking for a Defender of the Executive’s Time. You will be responsible for unburdening the Principal’s lines, speeding up operations, and safeguarding against overload to ensure long-term productivity and business growth.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

1. The Communicator’s Role (Primary)

Line Control: Receive all written communication 
, Text, WhatsApp) with no bypass.

Dev-T Filtration: Identify and return all "Developed Traffic" (Dev-T) to the sender. You will maintain a log of offenders and attach appropriate SOP references to all returned communication.

Daily Briefing: Prepare daily digital folders (SOPs, Orders, References) to be ready at the start of the Executive’s workday.

Compliance Policing: Maintain a Compliance Log to track all orders issued by the Executive. You will identify non-compliance early and present ready-to-sign HR actions to prevent "sudden shocks" or emergencies.

Defense: Remove upsetting or threatening communication from the lines, ensuring the Executive only sees what is essential for income-earning or high-level ministry.

2. Farmers Insurance Operations

Compliance Auditing: Perform weekly audits of client files in Apex/Alliance to ensure E&O documentation and e-signatures are 100% present.

Staff Tracking: Monitor mandatory training and state-level CE (Continuing Education) for all agency employees.

Project Management: Consolidate team tasks into a master tool (
) and follow up on overdue deliverables.

3. Ministry & Family Office Support

Ecclesiastical Support: Manage ministry inboxes, route pastoral matters, and coordinate seminar/event logistics.

Master Calendar: Reconcile business, ministry, and personal obligations into a "Single Source of Truth."

Wife Liaison Clause: Act as a secondary point of contact for the Principal’s wife to coordinate household services, family travel, and personal logistics.

QUALIFICATIONS

Management Systems: Familiarity with the Hubbard Management System (
 / Admin Know-How) is a massive plus. You must be willing to be tested on these references and be confident enough to correct the Executive if he violates them.

Communication: Exceptional English fluency. You must switch seamlessly between a professional business tone and a warm pastoral tone.

Experience: Previous experience in US Insurance (P&C) or as a C-Suite Executive Assistant is preferred.

Technical: Advanced Google Workspace, CRM (Apex/Alliance), and Project Management (Asana) skills.

PH Requirements: Must have a high-speed fiber connection (25 Mbps+), a secondary backup ISP, and a reliable power backup solution (UPS/Power Station).

HOW TO APPLY

Please send your resume and a cover letter detailing:

Your experience with US Insurance or Executive Support.

Your familiarity with the Hubbard Management System or Admin Know-How.

A brief description of your backup internet and power setup.

title: Video Editor - Meta Ads
description:
We partner with medical practices and doctors to build dominant digital presences through strategic content and paid advertising. We capture high-quality video content in quarterly shoots and transform that raw footage into organic posts and high-converting video ads that position our clients as the leading authorities in their medical markets. We’re now expanding our team to meet growing demand. I’m looking for an absolute expert in video editing.



Role & Responsibilities

As our Video Editor, your main responsibilities will include:

- Reviewing and organizing hours of footage

- Adding B-roll, subtitles, and appropriate music to talking head videos

- Editing multiple short-form reels for Meta ads and organic content

- Creating eye-catching, scroll-stopping content

- Managing multiple projects while meeting deadlines

- Proficiency in CapCut Pro and Adobe Suite (Premiere Pro, After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator)

- Working with a reliable internet connection and a computer capable of handling video editing software

- Comfortable communicating and collaborating through Asana and Slack





What We’re Looking For

You should have:

- Advanced English language skills

- An upbeat, helpful attitude

- 100% honesty and transparency

- Attention to detail (e.g., include your zodiac sign in the subject line!)

- Advanced knowledge of hooks and viral video techniques

- Advanced understanding of Meta ads

- Optional but valuable: Graphic design skills (thumbnails, social media graphics, motion graphics)

- If you cannot commit to daily output of 5–10 videos, please do not apply.



What We Value Most

- Good taste in design and content

- Timeliness and reliability

- Honesty and integrity

- Continuous desire to improve

- Asking questions and seeking clarification when needed

- Ability to follow step-by-step instructions

 A self-starter mindset and fearlessness in learning and helping



Work Schedule

- 5 videos edited per day

- Flexible hours; we care about quality and turnaround



Why Join Us?

You’ll be on the ground floor of helping our clients grow amazing businesses. Having had challenging bosses in the past, I’ve dedicated my career to creating a respectful, supportive, and growth-focused environment. You’ll be highly valued, and together, we’ll push each other to improve. We’re excited to work with someone who is as passionate about video editing and digital marketing as we are!



How to Apply

Please send the following when applying:

1. Your portfolio showcasing your video editing work, including reels, ads, and social media videos

2. Your resume, with references if possible

3. The completed Test Assignment (provided separately)

title: Revenue Manager
description:
Position: Revenue Manager

Company: Corporate stays

Employment Type: Freelancer /Full time

Working hours: Monday to Friday, 8 am to 5 pm Montreal time

Work from home





About Us



Corporate Stays is a global leader in furnished apartments and short-term rental management, with over 1,000 units in Canada and a rapidly growing portfolio across Latin America (Panama, Paraguay, Mexico, Brazil, Chile, Costa Rica).



We operate a portfolio of 300+ units and are scaling quickly, focusing on maximizing revenue, occupancy, and operational efficiency.





Role Overview



We are looking for a data-driven and experienced Revenue Manager to optimize pricing and performance across our international portfolio of short-term rental properties.





This role is critical to driving revenue growth and requires strong analytical skills, experience with dynamic pricing tools (especially PriceLabs), and a deep understanding of STR market dynamics.





Key Responsibilities



Manage and optimize pricing strategies across 300+ properties in multiple countries

Configure and manage PriceLabs (base prices, minimum prices, seasonal rules, last-minute discounts)

Monitor occupancy, ADR, RevPAR, and booking pace across all markets

Adjust pricing strategies based on demand, seasonality, and local events

Analyze competitor pricing and market trends

Optimize performance by building (not just by city)

Work closely with Sales, Marketing, and Operations teams

Support direct booking strategy vs OTA distribution (e.g. Airbnb)

Provide weekly performance reports and actionable insights

Continuously test and improve pricing strategies



Requirements



3–5+ years of experience in Revenue Management (STR, hospitality, or hotels)

Proven experience with PriceLabs (mandatory)

Strong understanding of short-term rental platforms (Airbnb, Booking, etc.)

Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills

Advanced Excel or data analysis skills

Fluent English (written and spoken)

Ability to manage multiple markets and properties simultaneously

Highly organized and detail-oriented



Nice to Have



Experience in Latin American markets

Experience with PMS systems (Hostaway, Guesty, etc.)

Experience with CRM tools like HubSpot

Background in hotel revenue management



KPIs (Success Metrics)



Revenue growth (RevPAR increase)

Occupancy rate optimization

Pricing accuracy vs market

Performance by building and market

Contribution to direct booking growth



Compensation



Salary: $1,200 – $1,800 USD/month (depending on experience)

Performance-based bonuses tied to revenue growth



Why Join Us



Fast-growing international company

High-impact role with real ownership

Opportunity to scale and grow into a senior leadership position

Work directly with executive team



How to Apply



Please submit:



Your CV

A short summary of your experience with PriceLabs and STR revenue management

Examples of results you’ve achieved (if available)



We are looking for someone who thinks like a business owner, not just an operator.

title: Direct Response Video Editor – Paid Social & VSL Ads (Full-Time | $800–$1,600/month)

 for revision feedback

title: Remote Structural Engineer / Revit Modeler
description:
******TO BE CONSIDERED AS AN APPLICANT, PLEASE SUBMIT YOUR MOST UP-TO-DATE RESUME AND A VIDEO INTRODUCTION TAILORED TO THIS JOB POSTING!******



Remote Structural Engineer / Revit Modeler



Job Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: Sunday to Thursday, 2:00 PM-10:30 PM PST (30-minute unpaid break) - Subject to client requirements

Salary: $1,200 per month



Job Overview:

We are seeking a highly skilled Structural Engineer / Revit Modeler to join our team. This role focuses on designing and detailing multi-level storage buildings, which require a unique structural approach due to their heavy load-bearing systems and specialized construction methods.

The ideal candidate is not only a strong structural engineer but also a super expert in Revit modeling, capable of creating precise, complex models with minimal supervision.



Key Responsibilities:

Design and model heavy, multi-level storage buildings using Revit.

Perform structural analysis and detailing specific to high-load industrial and storage facilities.

Develop accurate construction documents and shop drawings.

Collaborate with the engineering and design team to ensure models meet structural and architectural requirements.

Identify and solve design challenges with a focus on constructability and safety.

Maintain accuracy and consistency across all Revit models and related documentation.

Coordinate with project managers and other disciplines to ensure seamless project delivery.



Qualifications:

Bachelor’s degree in Structural Engineering, Civil Engineering, or related field.

Industrial and commercial engineering experience preferred, particularly with heavy load-bearing structures.

Proven expertise as a Revit Modeler, with advanced knowledge of large-scale modeling.

Strong understanding of structural systems, especially for multi-level and heavy storage buildings.

Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.

Excellent attention to detail and problem-solving skills.

Strong communication and collaboration abilities in a remote team environment.



Preferred Skills:

Experience with Steel Structures, Concrete Structures, Masonry Construction, Light and Gauge Steel Structures

Familiarity with BIM coordination and clash detection.

Knowledge of U.S. building codes and standards is a plus.

Knowledge of ETABS and SAFE is a plus.



Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

Job Type: Full-Time 

Work Hours: Monday to Friday, 7:00 AM - 4:00 PM PST, with a 1-hour break

Salary: $1000 per month



Job Overview: 

We are seeking an experienced Amazon International Marketplace Specialist to oversee and grow our presence across Amazon’s global marketplaces. This role requires hands-on experience managing Amazon Seller Central accounts, driving sales growth, and optimizing operations across multiple regions. The ideal candidate is analytical, detail-oriented, and has a proven track record of successfully navigating international e-commerce environments.



Key Responsibilities:

Manage day-to-day operations of Amazon accounts across international marketplaces (e.g., US, UK, Germany, Japan, Canada, etc.).

Develop and execute strategies to increase sales, improve conversion rates, and enhance product visibility internationally.

Optimize product listings for SEO, content, and localized messaging in different markets.

Monitor inventory levels, forecast demand, and coordinate with supply chain and fulfillment partners.

Analyze sales performance, customer reviews, and competitor activity to inform strategy.

Implement Amazon advertising campaigns (Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, etc.) to maximize ROI.

Ensure compliance with Amazon policies, international trade regulations, and local laws.

Collaborate with marketing, logistics, and product teams to execute promotions and launches.



Qualifications:

3-5 years of proven experience managing Amazon accounts in one or more international marketplaces.

Strong knowledge of Amazon Seller Central, Vendor Central, and related tools.

Demonstrated experience with Amazon SEO, advertising, and account optimization strategies.

Analytical mindset with the ability to interpret data and make informed decisions.

Strong project management skills and attention to detail.

Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal.

Experience with cross-border e-commerce, international shipping, and tax considerations is a plus.





Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

title: TikTok Account Growth Specialist
description:
Peak Medium is a content and marketing company based in Orlando, FL. We're looking for 1-2 TikTok Account Growth Specialists to join our account growth team.



Your job is simple: grow new TikTok accounts from 0 to 5,000+ followers using organic methods. No shortcuts, no bots, no paid followers — real growth through smart content strategy and consistent posting.



What You'll Do:



• Manage 1-2 TikTok accounts and grow them from scratch

• Post content daily (content will be provided — you don't need to create it)

• Optimize posting times, hashtags, and captions for maximum reach

• Monitor account analytics and report performance weekly

• Follow our content strategy and posting guidelines

• Experiment with trending sounds, formats, and hooks to boost growth

• Submit monthly performance reports with screenshots



What We're Looking For:



• Experience growing TikTok accounts — show us accounts you've grown before (with proof)

• Understanding of TikTok's algorithm, FYP, and what makes content go viral

• Familiarity with TikTok trends, sounds, and content formats

• Reliable, self-motivated, and able to work independently

• Strong English communication (written)

• Available to work consistently — ongoing role, not a one-time project

• Reliable internet + a device that can run TikTok



Bonus Points:



• Experience with TikTok Shop or affiliate marketing

• Experience growing accounts in e-commerce or product review niche

• Knowledge of AI-generated content workflows

• Experience with CapCut or basic video editing



What We Provide:



• All content/videos — you focus on posting and optimization

• Clear SOPs and posting guidelines

• Training and support

• One-time bonus for each account grown to 5K and approved for TikTok affiliate

• Long-term role with growth opportunities



Compensation:



• $200 USD/month (paid monthly)

• One-time bonus per account that reaches 5K + affiliate approval (starting at $100, increases with volume)



How to Apply:



1. Brief intro about yourself and your TikTok experience

2. Examples of TikTok accounts you've grown (with before/after follower counts)

3. Your strategy for growing a new TikTok account from 0 to 5K

4. Your availability and timezone

5. Include the word "PEAKGROWTH" in the subject line

title: Video Editor CapCut
description:
** Please Read Entire Post Before Contacting **



Hello, currently in need of a video editor that has experience with CapCut and ElevenLabs (very easy to use). I have a number of faceless YouTube channels. I am looking to hire one assistant available that can handle 7 channels.



I will provide access to all paid accounts. The channels are audio based, visuals are not important. Do not source separate clips based on the content of the videos except for rare occasions. We will recycle the same 5-6 backgrounds and rotate them daily across all videos. Every video each day will have the same background across all channels, we simply change it each day.



You can simply save the long background clip separately once made in CapCut and keep it in a folder for future use as it cuts down editing time significantly.



The process would be as follows:



- I would provide the script, you paste the script and generate the audio in ElevenLabs, download the audio, then create a basic video in CapCut with subtitles for the audio.



- The backgrounds can be looped clips from Pexel or Envato, stretched to match the time of the audio (usually 10-20 minutes).



- You download the video and upload to YouTube. I would provide the video titles, descriptions, tags, category, and the ChatGPT prompt to generate the thumbnail.



- You simply need to edit the videos so that it flows well and to generate the subtitles.



Must be knowledgeable in editing videos and must be able to know how to use CapCut. ElevenLabs is easy to use and I will provide a tutorial video going over the process to confirm the job.



Will be working about 3-4 hours a day as the videos only take about 10 minutes each to edit, I can show how in the tutorial videos.

title: Looking for Elite BIZOPP High-Ticket Experts (US Market)
description:
We are building high-converting, high-ticket BIZOPP offers for the US market and are looking for experienced operators who have already worked behind successful programs.



This is not beginner-level. We are not looking for “copywriters” or “marketers” in theory — we want people who understand how real BIZOPP funnels are engineered end-to-end.



You should know how to structure an offer from scratch: mechanism, positioning, VSL angle, funnel flow, onboarding, and monetization logic.



You’ve seen what converts. You’ve built or contributed to offers that actually sell.



We are building aggressively and need someone who can think in systems, not just tasks.



What you’ll be involved in:

- Designing high-ticket BIZOPP offers (structure, mechanism, positioning)

- VSL/script direction and angle development

- Funnel architecture (quiz ? VSL ? call ? close)

- Offer optimization based on performance feedback

- Working directly with a fast-moving team building multiple offers



You are a fit if:

- You have real experience with US BIZOPP / make money / high-ticket offers

- You understand what makes a VSL convert beyond just writing

- You can break down successful funnels and rebuild them

- You think in leverage, not execution



If you’ve worked on offers that did serious revenue, mention them.



We care about what you’ve built, not what you say you can do.

title: Sales Development Rep
description:
Cold Caller – SDR | Imperon | Remote | Part-Time

Imperon is a small, early-stage AI business. We help service-based businesses automate their calls and bookings using AI. It's just us for now  which means the person we hire works directly with the founder, gets real feedback, and actually matters to the outcome. We're not a big company. We're building something from the ground up and looking for someone who's okay with that.

The job

Cold Call service businesses, introduce what we do, and book demo appointments. That's it. Demos booked is your #1 metric. You'll hit 100 calls per day on your working days and keep simple notes on who you called and what happened. 



What makes this role easier then most SDR , You're just asking if they want to see something we already made for their business. People say yes out of curiosity alone.



What we need from you



Preferred 2 years experience in sales ( not required, if hungry)

Clear spoken English and solid written English — non-negotiable

Coachable — we'll give you a script and feedback, and we need you to actually use it

Comfortable making a lot of calls — rejection is part of the job and you're okay with that

Reliable — show up on your days and do the work

has some experience  with google calendar ,crm ,etc

Cold calling experience is a plus, but we'll train the right person

200/ calls per weekend

8 booked meetings per week

Internet seed 40mbps

backup power supply







Pay & schedule



$3.50/hour base

7% of profit on every deal that closes from your booked demos

On Target Earnings 670/month

8 hour shifts

2 days per week to start, Saturday & Sunday

Weekends Only

100% remote  quiet space and good internet required

After 1 month, review, this can become a full-time role with benefits



How to apply

Send a 60-second voice memo introducing yourself, just talk naturally and tell us why you want the role. Include a short note or resume with any relevant experience. YOU WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED UNLESS YOU SEND VIDEO.

title: Social Media Editor
description:
Job Title: Social Media Editor


 
 

Location: Remote – Philippines

Hours: [TBC – e.g. 20 hrs/week to start, with potential to grow]

Rate: [TBC]



About Us

We're Alex and Beck — a couple building personal brands on Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts. We're not selling a product or a course. We're building an audience around who we actually are — our lifestyle, relationship, travel, and everyday 
nts. We post frequently across multiple accounts and we want someone who can help us turn good raw content into great published content, quickly and consistently.

We're based in Sydney, Australia. We've worked with social media managers in the past, but we've found that what we actually need is someone who executes — an editor with creative instincts, not someone focused on scheduling frameworks and content strategy documents.



The Role

This is primarily an editing and content production role. You will take raw footage, photos, and ideas from us and turn them into polished, publishable content. You'll work across three Instagram accounts, each with a slightly different personality and purpose, and you'll help us maintain a consistent publishing cadence without sacrificing quality.

You will have creative input — we want your ideas, your honest feedback, and your eye. But the job is measured by what gets made and published, not by strategy decks.



What You'll Be Responsible For

Video editing (primary focus)



Editing short-form video content for Reels, TikToks, and YouTube Shorts from raw footage we provide

Adding captions, text overlays, transitions, sound design, and music

Colour grading and basic visual enhancement

Cutting for pace and engagement — you understand hooks, retention, and how people actually watch content



Graphics and static content



Designing carousels, quote tiles, story templates, and thumbnails

Maintaining visual consistency across accounts (fonts, colours, overall aesthetic)

Producing assets that look and feel premium, not templated



Workflow and communication



Reviewing revision notes left in 
 (or equivalent) and turning them around efficiently

Organising files in our shared Google Drive in an agreed folder structure

Flagging when you need more raw content from us so we can plan shoots accordingly

Communicating proactively — we'd rather hear "I need X to finish this" early than silence followed by a delay



Creative input



Suggesting content ideas based on what you're seeing perform in the lifestyle/personal brand space

Flagging trends in audio, editing styles, or formats that could work for our accounts

Being honest if something we've asked for isn't going to land the way we think it will





What This Role Is Not

To be direct: we're not looking for someone to manage our overall social media strategy, write lengthy captions about brand pillars, or tell us we should only post three times a week for maximum algorithm performance. We've been down that road. We want volume and quality, and we want someone who understands that personal brand content is built through consistency and personality — not a single perfectly optimised post per week.
