title: SPA BOOKINGS & CUSTOMER EXPERIENCE COORDINATOR
description:
This role is best suited to someone with strong experience in customer communication, bookings coordination, and detail-focused support work - not to a generalist virtual assistant or a pure social media manager.



ABOUT THE COMPANY



We are a growing business in the premium wellness, spa, and lifestyle experience sector, offering curated spa treatments, wellness packages, and giftable experiences through a network of partner venues.



Our business combines bookings, customer experience, partner coordination, CRM management, and digital marketing support. We help customers discover and book high-quality wellness experiences, while working closely with spa and hospitality partners to ensure a smooth and professional service from enquiry to confirmation.



We are now looking for a highly organised and proactive Spa Bookings & Customer Experience Coordinator to support daily operations, customer communication, and selected marketing tasks.



This is a full-time remote role based in the Philippines, working closely with the Director and supporting a business operating in the premium wellness and experience space.



SPA BOOKINGS & CUSTOMER EXPERIENCE COORDINATOR



(Bookings / Customer Support / Partner Coordination / CRM / Marketing Support)



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Bookings & Partner Coordination



• Manage customer bookings and coordinate with spa and wellness partners

• Ensure booking details are accurate, complete, and properly followed up

• Track confirmations, amendments, cancellations, and special requests

• Help ensure customers receive a smooth and professional booking experience

• Support day-to-day coordination with partners to avoid delays, miscommunication, or missed details



Customer Experience & Support



• Respond to customer enquiries by
 in a timely, professional, and friendly manner

• Handle booking changes and special requests with care and attention to detail

• Follow up on pending enquiries and unresolved issues

• Help maintain a high standard of communication and customer satisfaction

• Ensure customers receive clear, accurate, and well-written information at all times



CRM & Administrative Support



• Maintain and update internal systems, spreadsheets, and CRM records

• Manage and segment contact lists in HubSpot or a similar CRM

• Ensure contact data is clean, accurate, and properly tagged

• Support
 workflows, lead nurturing, and list organisation

• Assist with admin tasks and process improvements as the business grows



Marketing Support



• Create and schedule content for Instagram,
, and LinkedIn

• Assist with captions, simple visuals, and brand-aligned content preparation

• Support newsletters, promotions, and automated
 campaigns

• Update website content when required

• Monitor basic performance metrics and flag practical ideas for improvement



WHAT YOU BRING



• 2–5 years of experience in bookings, customer support, operations, administration, hospitality, wellness, e-commerce support, or digital marketing

• Strong written English and professional communication skills

• Excellent organisation and strong attention to detail

• Comfortable working independently in a remote role

• Able to manage a mix of operational, customer-facing, and marketing-related tasks

• Experience with tools such as HubSpot or another CRM, Google Sheets / Excel, social media platforms, and
 marketing tools

• Canva or basic design skills are a strong plus

• Experience in wellness, hospitality, lifestyle, travel, gifting, or premium service businesses is a plus



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



This role is for someone who is:



• Reliable and responsive

• Highly organised and detail-oriented

• Service-minded and customer-focused

• Proactive and solution-oriented

• Comfortable working with both structure and execution

• Able to take initiative without constant supervision

• Interested in contributing to a premium customer experience and growing with the business over time



APPLICATION CHECK



To confirm that you have carefully read this job description, please start your application with the words:



“Details drive results.”



Then answer the following question in 4–6 lines:



If you were supporting bookings and customer communication for a premium wellness and spa business, what types of details or issues would you pay close attention to in order to ensure a smooth customer experience?



Please also attach your CV to your application.



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



IMPORTANT



• This is a full-time remote role based in the Philippines

• Strong written English is essential

• Some overlap with Australian business hours is preferred

• Experience in bookings, customer support, operations, hospitality, administration, or related roles is required

• Candidates who are not comfortable handling both structured coordination work and customer communication may not be the right fit



WHY YOU WILL LOVE IT



• Work closely with the Director in a growing business

• Join a company operating in the premium wellness and experience sector

• Have a real impact on bookings, customer experience, partner coordination, and business support

• Enjoy a varied role with both structure and people-facing responsibilities

• Opportunity to grow into a broader operations or customer experience role over time



LOCATION



Remote – Philippines

Some overlap with Australian business hours preferred

title: Amazon & E-Commerce Manager
description:
Amazon & Ecommerce Manager — MySweetSmile (Remote, Full-Time)



ABOUT US



MySweetSmile is an award-winning teeth whitening and oral care brand with over 1,000,000 customers globally. We're the UK's #1 teeth whitening brand (The Independent, 2023 & 2024), sold across Amazon UK, US, and EU, Shopify, TikTok Shop, and multiple retail marketplaces. We're growing fast and need someone to own our marketplace operations full-time.



THE ROLE



You'll be the person who lives inside our Amazon accounts and marketplace platforms every single day. Your job is to ensure every listing, every market, and every backend detail is optimised, accurate, and up to date — so the founder doesn't have to.

This is not a VA role. This is full ownership of marketplace operations across multiple platforms and countries.



WHAT YOU'LL OWN



Amazon (Primary — 50% of role)

- Listing management across UK, US, DE, FR, ES, IT, NL, SE, PL — titles, bullet points, descriptions, backend keywords, search terms, product categories

- A+ Content creation, Brand Story updates, and image gallery management

- Flat file uploads and feed file management

- Listing experiments (A/B testing titles, images, bullets)

- Promotions setup and management (coupons, deals, Brand Tailored Promotions)

- Backend compliance: ingredients, directions for use, safety warnings, category accuracy

- Translations and localisation for EU marketplaces (using AI tools is expected)

- Keeping all marketplaces aligned to a universal standard set by the founder



New Product Launches & Marketplace Expansion (15% of role)

- End-to-end listing creation for new MySweetSmile products across all active marketplaces — content, A+ pages, compliance, and go-live readiness

- Facilitating new marketplace launches as we expand into UAE, Saudi Arabia, Japan, Singapore, and beyond — account setup, listing creation, marketplace-specific requirements, and ensuring all content meets local standards

- Working with the founder and operations team to coordinate launch timelines



Other Marketplaces (10% of role)

- TikTok Shop listing & store management

- Superdrug, Debenhams, OnBuy, and other retail marketplace listings

- Ensuring product data, imagery, and pricing is consistent across all channels



Inventory & Stock Coordination (10% of role)

- Monitoring FBA stock levels daily across all marketplaces

- Flagging restock requirements to the operations team before stockouts occur

- Coordinating on inbound shipment timelines and inventory planning

- Tracking stock positions across non-Amazon channels



Reporting & Competitor Monitoring (10% of role)

- Weekly marketplace performance report summarising sales, stock levels, and key metrics across all channels

- Reviewing advertising agency performance and flagging concerns to the founder

- Weekly competitor monitoring — tracking pricing, listing changes, and new product activity in our category



Creative & Design (5% of role)

- A+ Content design and image gallery creation in Canva

- Updating lifestyle and product imagery across listings

- Graphic design for marketplace-specific assets



WHAT YOU MUST HAVE — NON-NEGOTIABLE



If you don't have all of the following, this role is not for you.



- 3+ years of hands-on Amazon Seller Central experience — you know flat files, backend fields, feed management, and catalogue operations inside out. Not just UI editing.

- Experience managing listings across at least 5 Amazon marketplaces

- Experience launching products on new Amazon marketplaces (especially UAE, JP, SA, SG, AU)

- Confident with A+ Content, Brand Registry, and Brand Story creation

- Confident with Canva or similar design tools for A+ content, image galleries, and basic graphic design

- Experience with TikTok Shop or other non-Amazon marketplace platforms

- Experience with Shopify (product page updates, imagery, descriptions, pricing)

- Experience with Helium 10, Jungle Scout, or similar Amazon tools

- Basic understanding of Amazon PPC — enough to review an agency's performance, flag issues, and ask the right questions

- Experience with European marketplace translations and localisation

- Experience using AI tools (Claude, etc.) for copywriting, translations, and productivity — this is how we work and you'll be expected to use them daily

- Amazon compliance knowledge: ingredients, origin documentation, safety warnings, category requirements

- Strong written English

- Self-starter who takes full ownership and doesn't wait to be told what to do

- Detail-obsessed — you spot a wrong bullet point, a missing keyword, or an incorrect category and it bothers you



TOOLS WE USE

-Amazon Seller Central (global), Canva, Shopify, Notion, Slack, Google Sheets, Google Drive, Helium 10, AI tools (Claude)



SCHEDULE



Flexible within UK business hours overlap. We need at least 4–5 hours of crossover with UK time (GMT/BST) daily. Full-time, 50 hours per week, 6 days (1 fixed day off).



COMPENSATION



Depending on experience. Long-term role with room to grow as the brand scales into new markets and product lines.



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF:



- You only know basic VA-level Amazon tasks

- You've never worked with flat files or feed management

- You don't have marketplace expansion experience

- You can't design A+ content or work in Canva

- You need hand-holding or frequent check-ins

- You've never used AI tools for productivity

- You can't work independently across time zones

- You want a regular 9-5. 



HOW TO APPLY



Title your application: "MSS Amazon & Ecommerce Manager — [Your Name]"



Include:

- A short intro (3–4 sentences) on why you're the right fit

- A link to a Google Sheet or Doc showing your Amazon marketplace experience — specifically which marketplaces you've managed, what tasks you handled, and any results you achieved

- One example of A+ Content or an Amazon listing you've optimised (screenshot or link)



Applications that don't follow these specific steps will not be reviewed.

title: Project Manager (Leadership Team) – URGENT HIRING
description:
Take the next step in your professional journey!

Apply today through our official careers page: 



Company: Ascension Business Solutions LLC

Department: Operations / Leadership

Reports To: CEO / General Manager

Employment Type: Full-Time

Work Setup: Remote

Schedule: U.S. Business Hours (Graveyard Shift – PH Time)

Compensation: Competitive compensation package, commensurate with experience and leadership role alignment



ABOUT THE ROLE

Ascension Business Solutions LLC is seeking a high-accountability Internal Project Manager to lead and execute cross-functional strategic initiatives across Sales, Recruitment, Training & Development, Operations, CRM, and Client Success.



This is not an assistant role. This is an ownership role.



The Internal Project Manager serves as the operational integrator — ensuring leadership vision turns into structured execution. This role is responsible for driving initiatives from ideation to implementation with defined scope, KPIs, role accountability, timelines, and measurable outcomes.



ABS operates as a people operating system. Strategy without execution creates instability. This role ensures that initiatives are delivered with clarity, discipline, and measurable impact.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:

1. Project Leadership & Execution

Translate leadership strategy into structured project plans

Define scope, deliverables, timelines, and measurable success metrics

Build implementation roadmaps with clear accountability

Assign responsibilities and enforce deadlines

Identify risks early and escalate blockers proactively

Ensure projects are delivered on time and within scope



2. Cross-Department Coordination

Lead structured project meetings with clear agendas and outcomes

Align Sales ? Recruitment ? Training ? Operations ? Client Success handoffs

Ensure KPIs are aligned across departments

Eliminate silos and reduce execution delays

Establish clear ownership for every deliverable



3. Process & Systems Implementation

Build and standardize SOP frameworks for new services

Implement structured workflows within CRM, HRIS, and reporting systems

Ensure documentation is centralized, clean, and accessible

Audit process adherence and close operational gaps



4. Performance Tracking & Reporting

Define measurable KPIs per initiative

Track weekly progress and provide leadership dashboards

Distinguish leading vs lagging indicators

Recommend course corrections proactively

Improve operational metrics such as retention, onboarding cycle time, readiness rate, and handoff quality



5. New Service Launch Management

When ABS launches a new service line, this role will:

Define required roles and team structure

Coordinate with Recruitment on hiring criteria

Align Training on readiness standards

Align Sales messaging with operational capacity

Ensure full go-live readiness before client-facing rollout



QUALIFICATIONS:

Required Experience:

3–7 years of Project Management experience

Experience leading cross-functional teams

Experience building systems or processes from scratch

Strong understanding of KPI tracking and operational metrics

Experience in service-based organizations



Preferred Experience:

Healthcare or home care industry experience

Experience in scaling or growth-stage organizations



SKILLS & COMPETENCIES

Execution & Ownership

Strong bias toward action

Comfortable enforcing deadlines

High accountability standards

Creates clarity where ambiguity exists



Strategic Thinking

Breaks big vision into tactical execution steps

Understands operational cause-and-effect

Identifies bottlenecks quickly



Communication

Direct but professional

Comfortable managing up, across, and down

Can facilitate structured meetings



Systems-Oriented

Comfortable with CRM systems (GoHighLevel preferred)

Familiar with HRIS systems (BambooHR a plus)

Experience with project management tools (ClickUp, Asana, Monday, etc.)

Strong documentation discipline



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS:

Ascension Business Solutions offers a structured, long-term employment opportunity designed to support stability, growth, and professional development.

Competitive compensation aligned with leadership scope

Paid training and structured onboarding

Fully remote work setup (company-issued laptop and headset)

HMO health coverage (subject to eligibility guidelines)

Paid Time Off (PTO)

Performance-based annual salary increases

Retention and performance bonuses after 6 months



ABS is intentional about building long-term professional partnerships, not short-term or gig-based arrangements.



Why Join Ascension Business Solutions?

Directly impact company scalability and stability

Operate within structured leadership governance

Drive real, measurable operational improvement

Join a values-driven organization guided by Love, Support, and Excellence



Disclaimer:

Responsibilities may evolve based on business needs. Employment is at-will.

Complete the Application Form and include the following:

title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter (Fluent English Required) – Base + Performance Pay
description:
Overview:

We are a U.S.-based AI automation agency helping local businesses capture missed calls and turn them into booked appointments automatically.



We are hiring a results-driven cold caller / appointment setter whose ONLY job is to generate booked appointments.



If you are not comfortable calling businesses daily and handling rejection, do NOT apply.



Compensation:



Base Pay: $400/month

$10–$30 per booked appointment

$50–$200 per closed deal



Top performers can earn significantly more. This is a performance-based role.



Your Role (What You Will Actually Do):



Call U.S. local businesses (leads provided daily)

Speak directly with business owners or decision-makers

Follow a script while sounding natural and confident

Handle objections and keep conversations moving

Book qualified appointments on our calendar

Log all activity in CRM after each call



Daily Expectations:



50–100+ outbound calls per day

Consistent follow-ups with leads

Minimum: 1 booked appointment per week

Target: 3–5+ booked appointments per week



Failure to meet minimum performance will result in replacement.



Required Skills (Do NOT apply if you don’t meet these):



Fluent, clear English with strong speaking ability

Proven cold calling or appointment setting experience

Confident handling objections (not afraid of rejection)

High energy and ability to control conversations

Reliable internet + quiet working environment

Ability to work consistently and hit daily targets



Preferred (Strong Advantage):



Experience calling U.S. businesses

Sales or closing experience

Experience in home services, med spas, or local businesses



How to Apply (MANDATORY – Applications without this will be ignored):



Send a 30–60 second voice recording introducing yourself

Answer: How many calls per day have you handled before?

Record yourself reading this script:



“Hi, is this the owner?

Quick question — are you currently handling missed calls and bookings manually, or do you have a system in place for that?”



Record yourself responding to this objection:



“We’re not interested.”



Important:

This is a performance role, not a passive job.

We are looking for someone who wants to grow, earn more through commissions, and stay long-term.



If you can consistently produce results, there is opportunity for higher pay and leadership roles.



Apply only if you are confident on the phone and ready to perform.

title: Short-Form Video Editor & Content Manager — Instagram Reels & Facebook (Creator Brand)
description:
About the role:

I'm a Black millennial entrepreneur and content creator based in Las Vegas, Nevada with multiple brands — including a brick-and-mortar studio (
) and a growing community brand called Mom Math 
 create content about entrepreneurship, motherhood, and everyday life, and I need a reliable editor who can take my raw footage and turn it into polished, on-brand short-form content posted consistently across Instagram and
.



This is a long-term monthly retainer role. I'm looking for someone who takes ownership, communicates proactively, and can work independently once they understand the brand voice and visual style.



What you'll edit:

Talking-head Reels (me speaking to camera) — 15 to 90 seconds

Studio content for Needle and Stitch — short videos showcasing printing, embroidery, and alterations services to attract corporate and bulk order clients

Mom Math short-form content — punchy, personality-driven Snacks (15–45 sec clips).  Example of Mom Math content style/aesthetic: 

Occasional b-roll and product/service clips



Responsibilities:

Edit raw footage into short-form Reels and
 videos following brand style guides

Add captions, text overlays, and light graphics as needed

Schedule and post content to Instagram and
 on my behalf (up to 6 days/week)

Manage content across multiple brand accounts (Needle and Stitch Studio, LifebyMJ, Mom Math)

Communicate proactively about timelines and flag any issues early



Requirements:

Proven experience editing short-form social content — Reels, TikTok, or
 video

Strong sense of pacing, hook structure, and caption styling for short-form

Experience managing or scheduling social media posts on behalf of a creator

Reliable internet, fast turnaround, and strong written English communication

Able to follow a visual style guide and match an existing aesthetic across brands



Nice to have:

Experience working with Black women creators or lifestyle/entrepreneur brands

Familiarity with CapCut, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar

Experience with OpusClip or Descript



How to apply:

Send your portfolio or 2–3 examples of Reels or short-form videos you've edited. Include a brief note about your availability and your experience managing content for a creator. Applications without examples will not be considered.



Brand vibe:

Example #1: 

Example #2: 

Example #3: 



Tone: Smart, honest, a little sarcastic. Never preachy. Think Ali Wong meets Brené Brown — real talk with real stakes.

Audience: Black millennial women juggling entrepreneurship, motherhood, and staying sane. They're tired of being talked down to.

Format: Short Form — 15 to 45 seconds. Tight, punchy, high-retention.



Visual style

Captions: Auto-captions styled clean — readable, not cluttered. Sentence case. No all-caps.

Hooks: Text overlay in first 2–3 seconds. Hints at the outcome without giving it away. Creates curiosity before the scroll.

Pacing: Tight cuts. Remove dead air. Keep energy up without feeling rushed.

Text overlays: Aesthetic yet used sparingly for emphasis — not on every sentence. Let the speaking do the work.



Music: Low and ambient underneath. Never competes with voice. Trending audio when appropriate.



What to avoid

- Coach-y or corporate energy — this is a real person, not a course funnel

- Cheesy stock transitions or effects that feel dated

- Cluttered text overlays competing with the speaker

- Generic music that doesn't match the mood



When in doubt, ask: does this feel like something a smart, busy, slightly chaotic millennial mom would actually stop and watch? If yes — ship it.

title: STR Property Management Representative - Operations - $5-6/hr
description:
About the Company

Luxury Lodging is a fast-growing short-term rental property management company overseeing 300+ homes across the United States. Our team is performance-driven. We manage day-to-day operations, including pricing, guest support, maintenance, onboarding, and owner success. We’re hiring someone sharp and reliable to help with essential operational tasks.



This is not a short-term or temporary role! We are looking for someone who wants to commit long-term and grow with the company. This position requires consistency, accountability, and the ability to handle challenges calmly and professionally. If you are actively job hunting, frequently changing roles, or looking for a stepping-stone position, this role will not be the right fit. Please apply only if you are seeking a stable, long-term opportunity and are prepared to take ownership of the role through both smooth and challenging situations!



About the Role

Position: STR Property Management Representative

Location: Remote

Pay: $5-6/hr start

Type: Full-time (Eastern Time)



This is a well-rounded support role for someone who thrives on structure, takes ownership, and solves problems quickly. You will either be handling guest and client communication, coordinate cleanings and maintenance issues, follow up on tasks, assist with turnovers and documentation, and support the general flow of operations. The right person is proactive and clear-minded even when things get chaotic.



What You’ll Be Doing

• Serve as the main point of contact for guest concerns, complaints, and escalations

• Resolve guest issues efficiently while balancing guest satisfaction, company policy, and cost control

• De-escalate challenging situations with professionalism, empathy, and sound judgment

• Coordinate with internal teams (Operations, Housekeeping, Maintenance, Leadership) to ensure timely resolution

• Own guest issues from start to finish, including follow-ups and documentation

• Determine appropriate service recovery actions (refunds, credits, goodwill gestures) when applicable

• Document trends and recurring issues, and proactively flag opportunities for operational improvement

• File and manage guest damage claims, including documentation, follow-up, and coordination with internal teams or platforms

• Complete administrative tasks

• Keep SOPs, reports, and team checklists organized and up to date



What We’re Looking For

• Strong English speaking and writing skills

• Smart, resourceful, and highly reliable

• Strong sense of ownership and accountability

• Fast learner with good judgment and time management

• Excellent problem-solving and decision-making skills

• Organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable managing multiple open cases

• Confident working across multiple tools

• Detail-oriented and able to work independently with minimal reminders

• Background in Airbnb, hospitality, or remote team coordination is a plus

• Must be looking for long-term growth, not short gigs



How to Apply (All Steps Required)

Note: No AI-generated responses! You will be auto-declined.

1. Send a 1-2 minute voice message introducing yourself:

• Share an example of how you solved a guest or client issue

• Use Vocaroo or Google Drive (make sure it’s set to public)

2. Answer this in writing:

• How would you handle it if a guest checked in and said the place wasn’t cleaned?

• What strategy would you use to stay organized when handling multiple active properties?

3. Attach your resume

• Via a Google Drive link or similar (make sure it's set to public)



We are actively interviewing. If you’re ready to join a team that cares about output and results, apply now.

title: Online English/World History Teachers (Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency

Structuring videos to:

Hook viewers quickly

Maintain retention

Feel smooth and engaging



What I’m Looking For



Ability to replicate Daniel Daeln and Fin Kwong-style edits closely



Proof of past work:



You MUST have edited reels similar to this style before

Strong understanding of:

What goes viral on Instagram

Trending audios and formats

Hooks and retention strategies

Good taste:

Knows what looks clean vs. messy

Understands pacing and timing



Requirements



Very good English

Strong communication (this is extremely important)

Reliable with deadlines — reels must be delivered on time

Willing to communicate consistently and give updates



Work Setup



Not full-time initially

Work will come in batches/projects

If things go well, this can turn into a full-time role



To prove you read this entire job post, make the first line of your application "I read the entire job post" so that I know you read the job post fully.



Job Benefits:



Fully remote work

Flexible hours

Chill working environment — as long as you:

Communicate well

Meet deadlines

Do quality work



Growth Opportunity



If you perform well:



More consistent work

Higher pay

Potential to take on larger creative responsibility



To Apply



Also include in your applciation (don't use chatgpt I will know if you did):



Your experience and background

Why you would be a good fit

Amount of hours you can work per week

Examples of reels you’ve edited (similar style ONLY)

What software you use

How many clients you are working with now

title: Sales Manager (Outbound Campaigns)
description:
This is a high-ownership, performance-driven role.



You will be responsible for ensuring that:

Callers are trained properly

Calls are monitored daily

Campaigns are performing

Qualified leads (CDQLs) are consistently generated



This role sits at the core of execution — if campaigns succeed, it is because of you.



Key Responsibilities



Caller Training & Onboarding

Ensure all new callers complete training within the first 2 days

Conduct daily onboarding discussions to assess:

Campaign understanding

ICP clarity

CDQL qualification

Ensure callers understand how to structure their day to meet KPI



2. Daily Call Monitoring & Quality Control

Listen to call recordings for every caller, every day



Review:

Handover calls (for leads produced)

Minimum 5 calls for non-performing callers



Evaluate:

Conversation quality

Gatekeeper navigation

Qualification approach

Effort vs outcome



If calls are not being reviewed, the role is not being executed.



3. Caller Coaching & Performance Improvement

Conduct regular 1-on-1 coaching sessions

Use real call recordings for feedback



Help callers improve:

Openings

Listening skills

Objection handling

Qualification

Track improvement over time



4. Campaign Performance Management



Ensure each caller works toward:

1 CDQL per day (attended meeting)

Identify:

Campaign risks

Performance gaps

Behavioral issues

Drive corrective actions quickly



5. Performance Monitoring & Documentation

Maintain daily monitoring sheets for all callers

Classify callers based on performance:

Performing

Needs training



At risk

Document:

Call audits

Coaching actions

Performance trends



6. Accountability & Escalation

Identify low performers early

Take structured action:

Coaching ? Observation ? PIP

If no improvement within defined timelines:

 Initiate Performance Improvement Plan



7. Weekly Performance Reviews

Run weekly team calls with all callers

Present performance scoreboard:

Calls

Conversations

Meetings

CDQLs

Highlight gaps and improvement areas

Encourage learning from top performers



8. New Caller Evaluation (2-Week Review)

Evaluate every new caller after 2 weeks of dialing

If no CDQL is achieved:

title: Legal Lawyer For Social Media Company
description:
Legal Counsel / In-House Lawyer



Company: Grove London

Location: Remote / Hybrid

Employment Type: Full-Time

Start Date: Immediate

Role Overview



Grove London is seeking a highly skilled and commercially minded Legal Counsel to oversee all legal aspects of the business. This role is critical in protecting the company’s interests, ensuring compliance, and supporting rapid growth within the social media marketing and influencer space.



The ideal candidate will have strong experience in contract law, digital media, and employment law, along with the ability to act decisively in high-pressure situations.



Key Responsibilities



1. Contract Management & Legal Documentation

Draft, review, and negotiate a wide range of agreements, including:

Client service agreements

Influencer and creator contracts

Brand partnership agreements

Supplier and vendor contracts

Develop, implement, and maintain standardized legal templates across the business

Ensure all agreements align with company strategy and mitigate legal risk



2. Influencer & Talent Legal Oversight

Create and manage influencer agreements, ensuring clarity on deliverables, usage rights, exclusivity, and payment terms

Advise on advertising compliance (e.g. disclosure requirements, platform policies)

Handle disputes between influencers, clients, and the company



3. Employment Law & Internal Protection

Draft and enforce employment agreements, including:

Confidentiality clauses (NDAs)

Non-compete and non-solicitation agreements



Ensure employees are legally restricted from using or sharing proprietary company information

Advise leadership on HR-related legal matters and employee disputes



4. Business Legal Advisory

Act as the primary legal advisor to leadership on all business decisions

Identify potential legal risks and provide proactive solutions

Ensure compliance with relevant laws and regulations across all operating markets





5. Crisis Management & Dispute Resolution

Lead legal strategy during crises (e.g. contract breaches, public disputes, influencer issues, reputational risks)

Manage legal disputes, claims, and potential litigation

Provide rapid, clear guidance in high-pressure situations to protect the brand



Additional Responsibilities (Social Media Marketing Focus)



Advise on intellectual property rights, including content ownership, licensing, and usage rights



Ensure compliance with digital advertising laws, influencer marketing regulations, and platform-specific rules (e.g. Instagram, TikTok, YouTube)



Oversee data protection and privacy compliance (e.g. GDPR and global equivalents)



Review and approve marketing campaigns from a legal perspective



Support international expansion with cross-border legal considerations



Monitor and adapt to evolving regulations in the creator economy



Establish policies for content usage, brand representation, and online conduct



Ideal Candidate



Proactive, strategic thinker who can anticipate legal challenges before they arise



Comfortable operating as both a legal advisor and business partner

Highly detail-oriented with strong commercial awareness



Able to handle sensitive situations with discretion and professionalism



Calm under pressure and capable of leading during crisis situations

title: Executive Assistant
description:
Executive Assistant to Director of Operations

We are looking for a sharp, high-agency Executive Assistant to support our Director of Operations in a fast-growing company.

About the Role

This is a high-level support position focused on accountability, process improvement, and pipeline performance. You will not handle basic administrative tasks. Instead, you will help enforce standards, drive results, and ensure our front-office pipeline runs smoothly and efficiently.

Key Responsibilities



Support enforcement of accountability across Recruiting Coordinators, Onboarding Coordinators, Marketing Intake Specialists, and Tech Support Specialists.

Help monitor and improve key conversion rates (doc submission success, offer letter signing, rapid booking, etc.).

Assist in identifying and eliminating bottlenecks in our client recruitment and onboarding pipeline.

Support efforts to deliver ~80 qualified gig workers per week to the Quant department.

Help create and refine Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) and improve data tracking.

Provide upward feedback from deep in the pipeline to continuously improve client quality and experience.

Assist with process discipline, performance standards, and hard conversations.

Help oversee payroll, device supply chain (iPhones), and cost control while scaling output.

Support hiring and talent identification for front-office roles.



What We’re Looking For



Highly intelligent, quick-thinking, and responsive individual who can keep up with sharp senior executives.

Strong ability to instill accountability and maintain high standards in a remote team.

Experience managing or supporting entry-level remote teams (ideally 15–20+ people).

Excellent at building processes, measuring outcomes, and driving continuous improvement.

Comfortable supporting difficult conversations and performance management.



Compensation & Structure

This is a full-time remote role with a clear path to grow into the full Director of Operations position.

This is a high-impact role in a rapidly growing company (front office expanded from 1 to ~20 people in 16 months). You will work closely with leadership to keep the client pipeline flowing and the business scaling efficiently.

How to Apply

Send an
 to 
 with the subject line: “Executive Assistant Application”

Please include:



Your resume (PDF format only)

Any relevant university/college transcript

Any relevant national testing results (optional)



In your
, please answer this question:

“Why are you suitable for this Executive Assistant role? Please highlight any previous experience.”

Note: The quality of your formatting, clarity, and attention to detail in this
 will be a key factor in whether you are selected for an interview.

description:

title: Staff Accountant (QuickBooks Online) – Immediate Opening (Remote)
description:
We are a U.S.-based fractional CFO firm working with growing service-based businesses. We are looking for a sharp, detail-oriented Staff Accountant who takes ownership of the books and keeps everything clean, current, and accurate.



This is not an entry-level role. We need someone who already knows what they’re doing.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

Weekly transaction categorization (must stay current, no backlog)



Bank and credit card reconciliations (core part of the role)



Maintaining clean, accurate QuickBooks Online files



Supporting a fast and accurate month-end close (by the 10th)



Identifying and fixing discrepancies before they become issues



Working directly with the founder and team on financial workflows



What Success Looks Like

Transactions are categorized weekly



Reconciliations are clean and up to date



Month-end is closed by the 10th consistently



Minimal errors, minimal follow-up needed



Requirements (Non-Negotiable)



US Accounting Experience



2–3+ years of hands-on QuickBooks Online experience



Strong reconciliation experience (you’ve done this consistently)



Ability to work U.S. Eastern Time (9am–5pm EST)



Reliable, fast internet (we are on calls regularly)



Strong written and spoken English



Excellent communication, proactive updates



Self-starter, you manage your work without constant direction



What We’re Looking For

Someone who takes pride in clean, organized books



Someone who is timely and consistent, not reactive



Someone who communicates clearly and follows through



Someone dependable, no chasing, no excuses



Compensation

Competitive, based on experience

Paid twice monthly via Wise or Paypal



To Apply (Read Carefully)

At the end of your application, include the following:



Confirm you can work 9am–5pm EST (U.S. hours)



Confirm your internet speed (upload/download)



Your earliest start date (we are hiring immediately)



A short 2–3 minute video introduction covering:



Your QuickBooks Online experience

title: Remote Lead Generation / Business Development (Fintech Payments)
description:
Remote Lead Generation / Business Development Associate – Fintech Payments



Remote | Full-time or Part-time



We are a cross-border payment company working with digital merchants in Southeast Asia.



Our main clients include:



• Online gaming platforms

• Forex & trading companies

• High-frequency digital businesses



We are expanding our merchant acquisition team and looking for motivated individuals who enjoy research, outreach, and building new business connections.



Role Overview



As a Lead Generation / Business Development Associate, your main responsibility is to identify potential merchants and connect with the decision makers of online platforms.



Your goal is to introduce our payment solutions and move merchants toward the API testing stage.



You will focus mainly on merchant sourcing, outreach, and early-stage communication.



Your Responsibilities



Your daily work may include:



• Research online gaming or trading websites targeting Indonesia or India

• Identify websites with active payment or deposit systems

• Find
, WhatsApp,
, or other direct contact of the operator or decision maker

• Send the first outreach message introducing our payment solution

• Record leads and contact details in a shared Google Sheet

• Introduce interested merchants into group communication with the PAYJN team

• Assist merchants in moving toward the API onboarding and test transaction stage



Most merchants in this industry communicate via
, so the ability to find and reach operators on
 is very important.



What Counts as a Valid Merchant



A merchant will be considered valid when:



• You connect with a real decision maker or operator

• The merchant shows interest in exploring payment cooperation

• API onboarding is initiated

• At least one successful test transaction is completed



The API test stage is the main milestone for BD performance.



Required Lead Information



For each potential merchant, you should try to collect:



• Website link

• Screenshot of deposit/payment page

•
 / WhatsApp /
 contact

• Name or role of the operator (if available)



Leads without contact information will normally not be considered valid.



Pricing & Commercial Authority



You are responsible for introducing our services and initiating conversations.



However, you are NOT required to:



• Sign contracts

• Approve special pricing

• Make final commercial decisions



The company management team will handle pricing approvals and final agreements.



Compensation Structure



Base Salary

USD $400 per month



Base salary applies as long as at least one merchant reaches the API test stage in a month.



Commission



• 0.02% of transaction volume fro
rchants you introduce

• Commission valid for 6 months per merchant

• No commission cap



Example



If a merchant processes:



Average daily volume: $150,000



Monthly volume ? $4.5 million



0.02% commission ? $900 per month



Multiple merchants can significantly increase total income.



Work Structure



This role can be:



• Full-time

• Part-time



There are no fixed working hours, but consistent outreach and merchant sourcing activity are expected.



Ideal Candidate



• Experience in lead generation, sales, or business development

• Comfortable initiating conversations with potential merchants

• Familiar with
, WhatsApp, or online outreach tools

• Able to research and identify real online businesses

• Self-motivated and performance-driven

• Interested in long-term income growth through commission



Application Questions



Please answer the following when applying:



Have you worked in lead generation or business development before?



How would you identify if an online gaming website is real and active?



How many hours per day can you consistently dedicate to this role?



Are you comfortable completing a short research task within 48 hours?



Applications without answers may not be reviewed.
